Full_Review: The room was super clean It had all that you might need including windows that open for fresh air and a reading loft room 56

I liked everything about this hotel   The location was perfect right off of Rue Saint Germain nestled a small street with outdoor cafes shops and services We walked about 150 meters from the train station Had breakfast there and it was delicious for the 14 00 sur charge we had fresh cooked eggs and bacon fresh brewed coffee juices fresh baked pastries cheese and meats The next day we went down the street to a cafe for the more Parisian relaxed breakfast We walked to all of the main tourist attractions except to the eiffel tower

Our train got cancelled but we still got charged for our room for the night we were not staying there I know it s not their fault but it wasn t ours either  Excellent location for everything we wanted to do In a lovely part of the city and getting to it via the metro is very easy I d be happy to recommend this hotel

Internal doors could have better soundproofing Other than that a shower cap in the bathroom would be good and we didn t have breakfast in the hotel because the breakfast room was in the basement Plenty of places to have breakfast nearby though   We had a great stay here The location is great The bed was the most comfortable bed I can remember sleeping in The bathroom was small but the walk in shower was spacious and had a great shower and the air conditioning was perfect effective and almost completely silent The reception staff are fantastic so helpful and efficient as well as friendly and pleasant Thank you for a wonderful stay

The rooms were rather small   Although the rooms were rather small we got everything we needed It was very clean and the beds were very comfortable and the staffs very friendly I have been travelling Paris frequently but in terms of value for money it was the best

Rooms are small   The location was prime next to popular restaurants and cafes and within walking distance of many attractions The front desk staff was friendly helpful with restaurant advice and spoke excellent English The room had been recently remodeled with an extremely comfortable extra large bed and a small but beautiful bathroom The air conditioning was wonderful during a hot spell in Paris The in room Nespresso machine was a plus We especially appreciated the thoughtful lighting room and reading

Everything was just sensational   We were greeted by one the most friendliest staff and quickly found out all the staff were amazingly friendly but this one young lady in particular made me fall in love with Paris She was attentive to our needs helped us in and around the city and was just a breath of fresh air to walk down to each morning The location of this boutique hotel is central to everything Metro is 200 mtrs away the best restaurants around are just around the corner The bedroom is a little small but the bathroom made up for that I mean for its location it is understandable The bed was the most comfortable bed I have slept in truly amazing I cannot recommend highly enough this accommodation and the staff fantastic it made our time in Paris truly memorable Thank you

No complaints at all  Location was perfect buzzing area but just off the main drag Fantastic restaurants bars and shops on your doorstep Staff were extremely helpful and friendly Room was spotless and very comfortable bed

Fixed timing for room cleaning We were out the whole morning and came back after lunch to have a short nap However the room hasn t been cleaned were told that they were about to clean our room now or the cleaner would have to leave for the day In the end we opted not to have our room cleaned Not a huge issue but could have used the time we were away to clean the room   Walking distance to lots of restaurants and several metro stations The Seine was just a short walking distance away Great staff and fast wifi

Just one small thing in our room 20 there s not enough space for clothes We were there for 3 days which was just about ok but a week of living out of a suitcase would have been a nuisance However it wouldn t stop me booking this lovely hotel again   Superb peaceful location right in the thick of everything 5 minutes stroll to Pont Neuf Easy walk to many famous places and minutes away from lovely restaurants and the Metro Smart modern room gorgeous shower dreamy bed I wouldn t bother staying anywhere else

The trip wa too short  Beautifully renovated boutique hotel Staff were amazing and always friendly Room was generous with modern decor and a great bed The bathroom was small but met all our needs and besides this is city centre so to be expected This was in the perfect location to explore Hotel is still in its first year and I sure they will have many return visitors I highly recommend this hotel

Size of the room the room was small and withouth an armchair but it s difficult to find better in the hearth of Paris for a reasonable price  Perfect Location for visiting the city but also for enjoying the evening many good bars and restaurants close to the hotel Staff friendly kind and willing to help
Spacious room with beautifully appointed bathroom and large king size bed Located with many restaurants around it it made for a lovely night s stay

There was a little noise through the walls but nothing too bad Room was small but it s Paris   The staff was friendly and helpful Our bed was incredibly comfortable Location was perfect Although the room was small it felt very comfortable

There s nothing I didn t like about the hotel itself The only issue some people may have if they are in a front facing room is that there is an Irish pub a few doors down where the patrons often hang out in the street out front smoking and talking If you are a light sleeper and in a front facing room you might hear some noise from the street   Great location on a small restaurant lined street Only 10 minute walk from the St Michel Notre Dame RER station with connections to both Orly and Charles de Gaulle airports Friendly staff Nice Scandinavian inspired decor Super comfy bed Loved the scents of the bathroom amenities

Watch out for the towel radiator in the bathroom They get very hot and if you bend over you can get a burnt bottom   Great design super comfy beds and in a cool location What more could you ask for We loved stepping out and having everything on the doorstep But what we really loved was how quiet our room was despite being in a busy area You will love a stay here We will be recommending to anyone staying in the city for a long weekend

The room like most in Paris was quite small Not an issue though considering how nice it was   The staff were very friendly and helpful printed off some documents for us and lent us travel adapters The location is in a great area with lots of bars and cafes Within walking distance of the river boat cruise Louvre Etc Supermarket around the corner The room was very nice with a good TV and a lovely bathroom

Clean modern and well located hotel in border or 6e and 5e close to Metro Station Odeon Line 4 and Cluny la Sorbonne Lines 4 and 10 Wide selection of restaurants and coffee shops within easy walk Hotel staff could not have been more pleasant or helpful

small space complementary water is not provided everyday only served once still think it doesn t make sense because if thats the case we would check out then check in again to get new bottles of water   great location really kind reception
This is my 2nd time staying here and I could have pleasant stay always with nice staffs clean lovely room in appropriate size nice neighborhood etc

With one more square meter we would have been able to properly park our trolley   A very quiet and small hotel in an otherwise very busy part of Paris close to all the need to go to things and the Odeon metro station and taxi stand Very friendly and helpful staff as in helping us out in booking a table in an apparently fully booked restaurant Attractive modern design lots of bathroom space comfortable queensize bed nice and good lighting a rare exception in room nespresso machine plus cups and filled fridge

The hotel is easy to reach at only 7 8 minute from Saint Michel Notre Dame RER station The staff was very nice and helpful The room was impeccable and it was cleaned daily The hotel is very close to the Notre Dame Cathedral Louvre and Orsay museums 10 15 minutes of walking and has in its proximity various cafes and restaurants

The location is very nice right in the heart of everything going on in central Paris This is a clean relatively new hotel and is within 10 15 minutes of key tourist sites restaurants shops etc The front desk staff is very friendly always going above and beyond to help Would definitely return

The hotel is friendly and well maintained at an excellent location However while it may be pleasant for young people we are senior citizens and we found the rooms very cramped wth almost no space to hang clothes or shelves Also the rooms are rather claustrophobic So despite reserving for eight nights we moved on after one night to the Holiday Inn St Germain also booked via booking com It met our expectations and even though we booked on the same day offered much better value for money

Huge surprise and profesional service We could not arrive because of the accident and even when our booking was non refundable so we got a big discount on the next arrival valid whle year We re very pleased and thank you It is extremely important that it treat guests like this We will come for sure

Noise isolation is not good you can hear next door guests talking Bathroom door closer is really annoying Breakfast is understaffed Everytime something is out If you have juice you can t get a glass and if you have a glass you can t get juice   Staff very helpfull and polite Room and facilities very clean Near to Monparnasse Rail metro station A lot of TV channels in other languages helps when you have poor french

There was a noise that seemed to be coming from the ventilation system that was very annoying We told the staff about it but nothing was done   Very nice room good breakfast staff very friendly and helpful

The breakfast seemed a bit pricy but hotel breakfasts always do We just went to the Cafe St Placide on the Rue de Rennes instead   Every single member of staff was helpful and friendly The hotel was quiet but we liked that Everything was clean and well kept The beds and pillows were wonderfully comfortable There was a bar although it was so quiet that you sometimes had to go to reception to ask someone to come and serve but they always did straight away Close to restaurants and cafes but also easy access to the metro We loved it and I would happily go back More than lived up to expectations
Room too small  Got hotel welcome letter once booked the room and can feel the hospitality via mail Staffs are really great and location is very convenient

My son had a flight scheduled a few hours ahead of us so we asked the receptionist on duty the night before he had to leave to schedule a small taxi because he was trying to save money on fare He said yes The morning my son had to leave a taxi van came to pick him up He had to pay 9 euros more than we did for our van Everything else was fine except for this The receptionist should have communicated this to my son since he arrived in the lobby 10 minutes before the van arrived   We like that the staff is very approachable for the most part although with our lack of French communication was not that easy at times But that s expected by most visitors in France Nonetheless the staff treated us very kindly

No bad experiences I just wish that breakfast had been included but it was not because we didn t book directly went through Booking com Breakfast costs 20 Euros per person per night so we ended up at a cafe close by which was much cheaper albeit less convenient   The location was perfect nice quiet but close to restaurants shops the Metro etc We could easily walk to the Seine Les Jardins de Luxembourg the Pantheon etc Staff were friendly and the room upgraded to superior was spacious comfortable and very clean

Once checked in and up in the room we did understand why other people have mentioned how the rooms seem tired They are but for us it didn t take away from the experience and my friend described it as shabby chic Aside from that we really don t have any complaints about our stay although the cleaners could probably do with paying a little more attention to cleaning on top of things like mirrors and doorframes something we probably wouldn t have noticed if it hadn t been for the fact we watched Ramsey s Hotel Hell during our stay   Upon arrival at the Thistle Hyde Park we were greeted by an extremely cheerful member of staff on reception As it was only 10 45am we d stopped in to see if we could leave our bags there but were informed that our room was ready for us and we could check in straight away Not only that we d also been upgraded to a deluxe twin which was a lovely surprise after a tiring morning travelling The room itself was wonderful and extremely comfortable with a view out across the park even if it was mostly tree tops We both slept fine and the hotel was very quiet Upon check out the following day the staff also offered to keep our bags for us while we went out into the city something I haven t experienced before without having to ask myself

The spa treatments were slightly pricey but super convenient so worth it It was a perfect stay nothing to complain about   The hotel staff were friendly and service focused The room was beautifully decorated with designer walk in shower and very comfortable king bed TV was an Apple Mac and free wifi Nespresso coffee machine in the room The petite spa was a wonderful addition to the hotel with sweet little pool and steam room Massage treatment was wonderful The neighborhood was quiet but plenty of local excellent restaurants 15 minute walk to Musee d Orsay and 20 to Louvre or Eiffel Tower

Minor difficulty with the wireless keyboards which didn t function but we weren t in the room long enough to be overly inconvenienced Some taxi drivers work by sat nav which take the main routes If you can find a local cabbie who knows Paris the journey and cost can be halved   We have nothing but praise for the staff in general and in particular Lola who was extremely helpful and enthusiastic The room was good sized and the rose petals on the bed a nice touch Our family had arranged the room to be upgraded as a gift to us on our 40th anniversary The hotel is well positioned for the Metro which is just round the corner and there are a myriad of independent fashion food cafes antique shops within spitting distance A very classy hotel overall Paris has grown prohibitively expensive since our last visit and we re glad for the sake of our bank balance that we were only there 3 days Saying that it s a wonderful vibrant city that puts most others to shame and we both loved it despite the weather which was rainy We will have to save up for a few years before we come again though Maybe for our 50th

the wifi slows down from time to time but nothing extreme   I don t even know where to start to describe our amazing experience at the Belle Juliette First of we were very fortunate to be upgraded to a Romantic Room which was absolutely divine The facilities in the room were excellent from the iMac to the nespresso coffee maker As for cleanliness I cannot praise the staff enough in fact believe it or not there s been days we had the room cleaned twice without requesting it The spa facilities were also fantastic it almost felt as if they were exclusively made available for us as at no time did we see other guests If you want you can even arrange a massage which is about 70 euro per hour The breakfast was also plentiful delicious and yammy including the coffee I normally hate hotel coffee And lastly the front desk and F B staff have been wonderful special praises to Lola and Louis Overall it s been an amazing stay and by all means intend to return sometimes soon

The duplex suite we had booked for 2 plus a kid was not very practical Deco was not nice does not really associate with amything belle or feminine It was very cold deco amd small bed even for 2 Some of the retro plastic furniture didnt serve any purpose Eg bathroom tiny stool and low furniture Same goes for the living room cabinets and low furniture   Public spaces and staff friendliness

The hotel laundry sent my clothes back a bit too damp They were sealed in plastic when damp so ended up with a bit of a musty odor More hooks please I have a shaving kit and a garment bag that can both be hung from a hook Somehow hotel rooms never take advantage and provide hooks These are very minor complaints There is a lot to like about this hotel   The room was small but comfortable The location is good with easy access to four subway stops The area has many nice restaurants and shops Anything you might need is easily available The hotel also has a very nice patio bar at the back that overlooks a very attractive garden The hotel itself and room are quite attractive The staff friendly and very attentive The shower was the nicest I ve ever encountered in Europe and the bathroom was well laid out There was enough space for my wife and I Closet space was also sufficient View out the window was excellent and the blackout curtains were the best I ve ever encountered They made the room completely dark any time of day

Located in quite a quiet area great quality of sleep but you might need to travel a little further for evening nightlife   Absolutely fantastic hotel couldn t have been better looked after Room was absolutely huge Would definitely stay here again

For us the main problems resulted out of disappointment and a misalignment with our expectations in general Rooms are small as per Paris standards but that was fine for us since we did not really spend too much time in the room Toilettes are separated from the bathroom So inside the room the toilette and the bathroom are located in two different smaller rooms This was a problem because if you need to go to the toilette in the middle of the night there is no way you are not going to wake up your fellow traveller You need to close one door and open another and walk around in the room to do that There is an Apple TV which I think might be available for use as a computer That was slightly noisy during the night like in sleep mode so not absolutely noisy but this was disturbing for us The receptionists were trying to be helpful and friendly they answer all questions and smile constantly but in our opinion some of that was forced and not always genuine and effective really We went down to the spa to see where it was and how it was and thought it was smaller than it seemed in the pictures We were told that there was a steam room but we saw only the Turkish hammam Maybe this is the steam room In the end we could not use the spa anyway since it was not open before 9 am in the morning The halls on the floors where the rooms are are really dark and lights are automatic In the evening when you are walking to your room this can be a bit bothering and scary really When we went down to get coffee or breakfast there was no one available in the bar terrace area to ask for anything We ended up going out for our morning coffee which was a shame because the terrace seemed nice and we might have wanted to enjoy a cup of coffee in the terrace   The location of the hotel is not bad it was a neighborhood we wanted to be located in However it may not be ideal for all travellers as proximity to some of the more touristy areas airport transfers are not the easiest The hotel is said to have a transfer service though which may be appealing to some travellers We did not use it It seems like this is a newer hotel which was a plus for us It was mostly modern and clean WiFi worked without disruptions

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: The room that I booked turned out to be horrible and I insisted on a transfer After some haggling I agreed to pay ten British pounds more for a better room The bed in that room was awful I couldn t believe I was going to complain again but I did the alternative was to pay the one night room cost and move to a better hotel The staff graciously moved me to a better room and told me they even added a pilot option so I would be more comfortable   It was a full breakfast and good value

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: A few cobwebs in the room   Friendly staff breakfast was lovely Location was brilliant with just a 15min walk into Covent Garden perfect location for a night at the theatre

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Very small wardrobe and little space in my first room for couple of days OK but for 2 weeks uncomfortable Fortunately I changed this room soon   I stayed at this hotel 14nights and I really appreciate comfortable king size bed quite corridor polite and very helpful staff receptionists especially Nina and young receptionist man from Italy sorry I do not remember his name tasty breakfast and friendly staff in the restaurant

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Bearing in mind that this hotel costs over 300 per night including breakfast guests are entitled to expect excellent service and standards The delux room was satisfactory for a hotel of this standard but not exceptional The only extras provided were two small warm bottles of water It was very hot weather Some staff were a bit off hand Breakfast was satisfactory but scrambled eggs cold choice and quality about average No choice of coffees Check in is late at 3pm and we arrived hot and tired at 1pm and could not access our room Again for this quality of hotel this is poor   The hotel is comfortable the reception bar and dining areas are spacious and comfortable The room was reasonably spacious and comfortable The location is good and lively with easy access to the centre of London

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Nothing like the level of cleanliness renovation fixtures fittings and comfort you would expect at this price point Lift size capacity speed and noise suggesting imminent breakdown Worn paneling in the bathroom no toilet brush Communicating with some staff in English was not so easy   The location is great for the British museum and central London in general The first impression when entering the foyer reception area is positive Friendly staff

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: The bathroom was falling apart The shower didn t work properly and was dirty The basin was loose and the taps for the basin were not attached correctly so when you try to turn them on or off the whole unit turned The room has very little sound proofing and therefore all the noise from the street kept me awake most of the night I definitely felt like I was staying in a cheap 2 or less star hotel and definitly was not a 280 per night room sorry DoubleTree but I felt a little ripped off and would have been better off staying in a travelidge or premier inn instead Don t let guests stay in rooms that are in need of repair and sort the noise levels out in the rooms that are street facing and perhaps the rating would be better consider charging a more reasonable price for a standard room   Great welcome from the reception staff overall cleanliness and location

Full_Review: We booked for 2 nights and were put in room 335 on the first night I had booked a double room but this room was more like a single the air con unit made a noise with no cold air it had been 30 degrees that day too We were moved the next night to a bigger room but it was on the second floor on the front so extremely noisy but the air con unit was better The staff were friendly and helpful but it would have been nice if they had offered us a discount or free breakfast for the inconvenience I have stayed here before so know how big a double room is I felt like we had been fobbed off with a smaller room as we didn t come back to the hotel until 10pm I had booked it months in advance as it was for my birthday I won t stay there again   Location

Full_Review: The actual toilet bowl in the bed room was disgusting underneath the rim This caused a terrible smell in the whole area especially whenever we opened the door to the room There was only one packet of biscuits between the two of us and two teabags

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: N A  The accommodation was good clean with great air conditioning Accepted a room at the front of the hotel we were a little worried about the noise from the road at first but actually didn t hear a thing First rate staff with a very jolly front of house meeting us for breakfast which was equally as good The hotel was perfectly placed for our excursions on foot which took us to the theatre shopping on Oxford St and several restaurants all within an easy walk Great would definitely go back again

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: nothing   Amazing hotel from the moment we entered the lovely hotel the staff were very helpful We were upgraded to a premium deluxe room which was a great bonus The rooms were comfy spacious and very clean The room service menu was excellent we had a long day travelling so decided to order room service and I was impressed with the variety The prices were very reasonable the service great and the food was lovely We also spent some time in the hotel bar and the staff again were great all in all a lovely hotel made even better by the staff Location wise it was excellent walk down Southampton Row and your at Aldwych approx 10 mins which is ideal There are plenty of restaurants and bars around the area as well

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Bed was comfortable Good variety for breakfast Welcome cookie is the best tasting cookie I have had in some time Great location to catch Underground

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: View of large ac unit out our window with stairs to a walkway infront if our window Pillows Level of noise Promised late check out bookable on arrival which was refused on arrival and we had a hospital appointment so really needed this We have booked a different hotel for our next visit  Welcome and breakfast

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Breakfast whilst there was plenty of choice was not that hot I suppose this is a problem with all buffet type breakfasts   Received cookies upon checking in Not had this happen before and was a nice touch to welcome us to the Hotel Upon returning to our room after being out all day we found a plate with a small cake on it to wish us Happy Anniversary it was our wedding anniversary and a card plus letter from management Really made our stay

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: I thought it was overpriced Room wasn t very big and quite basic Was no better than a premier inn yet priced higher   Breakfast was good Staff were very friendly

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Can hear everything going on outside of rooms and they could do with some refurbing  Reception of the hotel and restaurant is beautiful and great breakfast

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Room didn t look like the picture very small struggled getting through the door View from window into people s properties   All staff were lovely and friendly reception bar was gorgeous

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: The kitchen closed early and when we arrived late and hungry we couldn t even get a packet of crisps There was no room service Our room was very dark and dingy

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: The water in the shower was cold and despite this being reported twice it was not corrected during our visit   The breakfast was good and the breakfast service was also good The location is excellent

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Would ve liked a better view but I under it cannot be guaranteed however didn t affect the experience  The pillows were very comfy and overall experience was very good

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Only grumble was that we did not get the fridge for my husbands insulin as requested on my booking form and it did not materialise despite asking again after checking in   What s not too like Excellent staff lovely room and restaurant dinner was first class Location was ideal for our trip as everything was within easy walking distance

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: The room  Bed are very small and the room too didn t sleep well at lots of work going on drilling sound most of the evening and 1st thing in the morning

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: We were allocated a disabled room when not required and found the bathroom a little disappointing in comparison to the comfortable room   warm cookies on arrival on check in and on request Comfortable beds quiet rooms and fluffy pillows

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Uncomfortable matras I could feel the springs in my back Bathroom was not very clean Room was small for the price paid   Staff was friendly Hotel has a good atmosphere

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Our room was very small initally but the staff moved us on our second night there However although the room was bigger the bathroom was very small   Loved the atmosphere and the staff were very helpful The free cookies were a real treat The location was perfect and the food in the bar was lovely

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: My parents stayed here for their 60th birthday present On arrival they were upgraded to a premium room and on departure were given a complimentary drink They were so happy and I am so grateful that the staff were able to add these little extras which made the experience even better Thank you

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: There was a small issue with the room we were allocated and the desk staff resolved the matter promptly and without fuss which was appreciated Cookies on arrival are very good

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: I know that hotels in London usually have small rooms But my room was more like a cabin on a small boat They compensated this with an extra small bed I am 6 3 and the both my feet were hanging out of the bed the bed felt more like and extra bed it was very hard and my shoulders streched pretty much all across it one of the windows had a crack all across it and the slightest wind made it slam all night There was abolutely no pressure in the shower so soap and shampoo took forever to get off I mentioned this when checking out but not really any response was given I am sure that they have nice rooms aswell but considering such a price at a in general nice chain this was way under my expectations   Clean hotel in a good location

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Staff at bag collection quite rude and seemed like it was an inconvenience to them to help us   Friendly staff at check in and the room was ready early which was great Comfortable bed and good facilities

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Bed was small and not comfortable Shower very weak The lifts were scary creaking and noisy and very small   All staff very friendly and efficient Location amazing for west end Covent Garden and for attending courses at royal colleges GP s and surgeons

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Staff seemed a little unsure hesitant on the front desk upon arrival   The excellent central location and underground links The cleanliness was fabulous and bed super comfy

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: The room was noisey there was an air extraction vent outside and the noise was noticeable when trying to sleep Room 124  The location was good not in the hustle and bustle but all the atractions are rapidly accessible

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: the room was simply too small no bottled water in the room on arrival Bar staff although very friendly were very slow   excellent front of house staff excellent breakfast

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: I didn t like how close to the main road we were as I did not have a good night sleep due to the noisy traffic however that cannot be helped  The bed was comfortable the tv had a variety of different channels and there were plenty of mirrors and wardrobe space

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: We stayed at the Westminster Doubletree a couple of months ago This was far superior but cheaper than the West End hotel The room was tiny bathroom not clean no shampoo plug didn t close shower head wobbled   The breakfast was very good value for money Lots of choice The air conditioning worked

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: The room was small and the bed pushed up against the wall meaning I had to climb over my partner to get out   Staff were lovely and helpful the location was good for everything we wanted to do The food in the restaurant was very good

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Shower was not particularly excellent weak water pressure and not particularly hot   Lovely staff and a complimentary freshly baked cookie upon check in still warm and gooey

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Deluxe rooms are very small but you re paying for location here Staff weren t that helpful either at directions or suggesting restaurants or bars to go to   Good location nice and relaxed bar

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Couldn t honour our 6 month old booking and put in rooms in the basement rooms were ok but disappointed we didn t get what we booked and paid for   Location and hotel was very clean

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Hot water took up to 10 mins to come through morning and evening Bed head was worn out and un hygienic toilet seat loose only some of the lights worked on the bathroom cabinet cracked wash basin Not what we expect from the Hilton

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: We booked a 2 bedroom apartment with each having a double bed we received an apartment with 1 double bed and 1 single which I would class this as a family room for two adults and a child The lift was broken the whole time we were their this wasn t too much of a problem but walking to our room seemed forever we felt we were going down stairs up stairs down loads of corridors and eventually into a room at the far end of nowhere the room was dingy the back of the door looked like it had something spilt down it and it had never been wiped down the room was just not acceptable for the money paid  The reception area was lovely the bar area was comfortable and relaxing staff were very nice and polite breakfast was good

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Room was very small bed was very uncomfortable could hear all water pipes all night and small road traffic noice and people outside are bedroom door bathroom was very dirty  Nothing

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Being charged 12 5 service charge in the bar restaurants can understand but prefer that its left to the client but in the bar Gluten free bread not restocked disappeared early first morning and that was that  Breakfast was good although gluten free bread was an issue Breakfast room manager very good and very welcoming

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Lifts very small  The room was bigger than I thought Shared with a friend Could have done with a few more tea bags etc nice toiletries Breakfast buffet nice selection and hot

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: The room was cold as there was a massive draft coming in from the windows in room 144 I reported this this morning as we were so tired last night when we got in   Bed was nice

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Coffee during the breakfast was quite bad Size of the room though typical for central London leaves some space to dream of more space   The location is really great The hotel has the needed facilities including 24 hour fitness room Great bar with the right coffee to serve Friendly staff willing to help

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Small room for a double but I suppose it s london Very impressive entrance foyer Rooms a little dated not up to standard of entrance Breakfast standard nothing special but adequate for need  Comfortable bed Very pleasant staff

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Our 2 bedroom suite was boiling hot clearly there was an issue with the thermostat not safe to put two kids in I was shown an identical boiling hot room on the same floor and told that it was my imagination it was not habitable either We were eventually put into a smaller suite with a dirty toilet and stained sheets The management were prompt and polite housekeeping arrived to fix the problem but I was charged the whole full rate and the only compensation was when we checked out I was given the manager s card and ensured an upgrade next time No thanks   It is in a very good central location with access to a secure and fairly reasonable car park Bloomsbury placed and Holborn Tube both a 2 minute walk from the hotel

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Bedroom tiny nothing like the image shown Picture shows two bedside tables and room either side on double bedroom Reality one double bed pushed up to a wall and one bedside table tiny bathroom Not very romantic when you have to climb over your other half to go to the bathroom   Location good

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Bathroom to small but overall excellent  The breakfast it was excellent the only thing we could say the staff were very friendly but to quick to take the plates away

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: There was a screaming baby across the corridor We couldn t sleep The hotel staff said no rooms available at all But when I spoke to another person when checking out they said the hotel was only 90 full Whilst I understand the baby crying was not the hotels fault it wasnt mine either We obviously booked a hotel to sleep Was disappointed that no genuine effort was made to help the situation and the staff in general were not happy no smiles on their faces   Great location

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: The bed was a bit hard   Great location we could walk to Covent Garden to the Alwych theatre Check in staff very helpful we got into our room before 1pm Parking nearby Breakfast was good included in the price lots of choice

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: We entered room and smelt a damp smell but aircon was off when on smell was gone shape of room was horrible and in the morning my wife tried calling for service no answer but maybe next time will get normal shape room  Location is fantastic

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: The original double room was really a single with only access to one side of the bed and no floor space We asked to move and they accommodated thankfully The air con made too much noise so had to switch it off   The staff were really friendly and helpful The breakfast was fantastic Shower was good and the bed was comfy

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Room A C ineffective Bathroom basin no water pressure unable to use Breakfast we were put in an overflow room and left to our own devices  Hotelin a great location

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Elevators a little small especially if you ve brought a larger piece of luggage   Excellent location fantastic service very comfortable room luxurious features

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Room like a box no window view only a plank of wood and strairs squashed wouldn t stay again Noisy hall all night disappointed thought Hilton had more class  Nice breakfast

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Not a lot to dislike about the hotel bed was a little hard for me but that s down to personal preference  Really friendly and welcoming staff the fact that they offered to look after my luggage as I checked out so I could take care of some business was fantastic and a great help breakfast in the morning was fantastic parking really close and didn t break the bank Will defiantly stay there again

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: I disliked the obligatory company policy 50 addition to my pre authorisation card authorisation but this seems a common trend with big hotels over the last couple of years also there was a big muddle after the event with wrong debits to my card a c for no reason other than staff inexperience happily sorted after a couple of days Rocsana on reception was extremely helpful   The room was very comfortable and well equipped breakfast excellent and staff helpful and courteous

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Bedroom fitted cabinets were battered and the door to the mini bar door was hanging loose but re hung quickly when reported however The room was cramped and the layout not so good but I d guess this is a function of the original building  Sandra on duty at breakfasts was most helpful and friendly and even remembered our names

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: I paid extra for a deluxe suit but I found it could have been better the lampshade next to the bed was really stained I also left a message saying it was for a 50th birthday but that was ignored and no fuss made  Lovely hotel friendly staff

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: the shower and washing facilities the hotel must have a low water pressure problem as the water was tricle at most very dissapointing  Bed was comfy room clean although a little bit to hot

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Could have triple rooms Although staff turned ours in to one It would ve been nice to book it as a triple room   The gentleman that checked us in was superb couldnt do more to help and very friendly Also lovely warm cookies on arrival nice touch

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Shower head in room was broken and we had to hold in position to have a shower When we asked how to get to Aldwych Theatre we were told take a taxi and when we said that we wanted to walk he hadn t got a clue and was disinterested in helping   Breakfast was excellent Bar staff were very polite and helpful Room was comfortable and spotless

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Reception girl Louisa not very friendly an hello or a simple welcome on our arrival would of been more appreciated than next and reservation number 11 30 arrived back to hotel handful of guests in the bar three staff on duty I ordered Irish coffees and was told there was no double cream I replied double cream was not necessary that single any cream would be ok sorry madam we have no cream in the hotel 8 30 this morning our door was banged by housekeeping I didn t request a wake up call and didn t appreciate been woken but I guess that was the housekeepers way of getting her work done Very inconsiderate of her could she not have just checked with reception first or is she not aware 11am is check out   Location comfortable beds

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: I was given the room reserved for disabled guests and the room had twin beds which I did not request The carpet near the desk was also soaking wet It was an awful room I didn t take the time to complain as my time was very limited but I am surprised I was allocated this room   The location

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: The room was situated beside the air conditioning unit it was just outside the window making a good night s sleep difficult If we came again we would refuse to stay in that room   Staff very pleasant and helpful hotel good atmosphere

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Staff we re not the friendliest quite a direct style and approach to customer service Room is quite small too for the price   Location is convenient 4 minute walk from the station

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Plug sockets in room didn t work no shaver plug in the bathroom no plug sockets near the bed  Beds were comfy and the room was very lovely staff and reception were very welcoming

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: U can t collect points for your stay on the Hilton card if u book from booking com So Hilton group should review this and allow customers to collect points where ever they book this from

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Tea making facilities would have been better with better selection of tea and coffee as only a single item of each In a hotel such as this I d expect to be able to have a coffee or tea in the evening and morning Otherwise excellent  Excellent cooked breakfast Liked the hot cookie provided on arrival

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Concierge was a little abrupt when checking in the guests   This was a Christmas present for my daughter and Granddaughter from me the answers are my daughters

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: The hotel is clean staff are friendly My son loves the cookie given on arrival They even stored our luggage whilst we went to the hospital on the day of departure

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: We had the best time in this hotel We stayed for 3 nights for our Wedding Anniversary The staff was very attentive to our requests wishes and welcomed us warmly The Executive room was lovely with a VERY comfortable King size bed The room was very well equipped clean and made our stay enjoyable The Location is perfect close to two underground stations nice to walk around and within walking distance to Oxford street the British Museum good restaurants As Hilton honors members free enrollment we received 10 discount at the bar free WiFi and a late checkout upon availability A perfect hotel for a wonderful visit in London Thank you very much Rebecca Itay Hurvitz

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Slight touches of maintenance such as hand rail in lift was hanging off   Staff excellent variety for breakfast was very good and hotel felt welcoming and comfortable

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Standard double room was a bit small but acceptable for a weekend visit  The hotel is very well located 10 mins walk to Leicester Square and plenty of restaurants nearby All of the staff were very friendly and helpful

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: I stayed 9 nights in the Doubletree Hilton Hotel I was in London for bussiness and loved this location It was nearby the British museum and only a 10 minute walk away from Oxford street Subway is also closeby Holborn I enjoyed my stay here so much The ladies at the reception where lovely even when I had some troubles checking in they helped me and where really helpful with everything For the room it is small but for one person big enough Bed was comfy and breakfast super extensive Next time I will book this hotel again

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: The air conditioning in the bedroom was noisy and right above the bed We were unable to switch it off so had a poor nights sleep We stayed in room 341  Excellent friendly staff we had dinner and breakfast which were both very good

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Just pillows could be a little firmer   The room was lovely The pillows a little soft for us but that didn t detract from the overall excellent facilities The breakfast was outstanding and the staff polite and helpful Thank you Double Tree

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Room was a little small Would have liked a walk in shower rather than climbing into the bath   Location was ideal Bed was comfy Choice at breakfast was great as were the staff in the restaurant

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Found 1st room was double booked found shirts on wardrobe 2nd room key would not open room so had to return to reception to get it reactivated   Breakfast very good Bed very comfortable

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: It was a shame that no double rooms were left so had to have a twin room The bathtub was also very small   Fantastic customer service I got a free cookie while checking in and the lovely receptionist also gave me a free voucher for breakfast

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: No bell service room was as big the single bed The space is so tight that I had to walk sideways to get around I can hear the people in the hall as if they were inside the room My college dorm room was bigger I complained and was asked to pay more to get a normal sized room I checked out the next day with a complaint the staff told me that I should have complained to get the room changed and that is what they always do this hotel has a nice lobby but the rooms are more like a 1 star motel For the same price you can stay at nicer 4 star hotels in the area DONT WASTE YOUR MONEY OR TIME WITH THIS PLACE Just as a mention I was offered breakfast for my complaint and they said they will do more After I accepted the breakfast they told me that they can t do anything because I accepted the breakfast   Lobby was ok

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: the staff at the reception wasn t professional no eye to eye contact with poor English was a bit tough sounds like giving orders rather than serving   excellent hotel very clean wonderful location breakfast is nice we had a complementary upgrade which was really nice experience

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: The room was nice but was not worth the money we paid for it   The staff were very friendly and inviting The beds were very comfortable The location was very convenient

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: The fact that the toilet was in a used condition when entering the room No information pack Bathroom was tiny Clocks had not been altered and put back the hour

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: pillows weren t great Every time you put your head on them filling went either side which made them almost uncomfortable   Beautiful room staff were lovely cookies were great addition

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Had to ask for dressing gown and slippers no fridge in room lack of soap no face cloths Room not as clean as when i have stayed before   Staff very friendly excellent breakfast

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Just a fridge in the room and instructions how to use air con and heating but very minor points   Everything about the hotel it s location it s staff and all round experience will be back again

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: More tea and milk etc in the room but they were very speedy at getting us some more when we asked   The cookies and the lovely staff who brought us extra tea to the room Comfy room with plenty of space for the two of us The location was perfect for us visiting landmarks for getting around by foot walking distance from King s cross but also close enough to the tube for when we wanted to travel further afield

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: The room was tiny compared to what it looked like on the pictures there was a lot of things in the room that needed fixing like wholes in the curtains and the ceiling had bubbled and cracked Also the TV didn t work   The location was amazing right near everything we needed for our trip

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Toileteries not replaced care line on phone didn t work so I called to the desk on my way out thinking it could be done before I got back But I was handed them from a box under the desk and they only had 3 of the 4   Lovely hotel Nice room and bathoom Chain on door Hot Cookie on arrival Great location Three lifts

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Our room was at the front of the hotel and was quite noisy from the road noise we didnt realise on the first night that our windows were slightly open and closing them made a massive improvement for the 2nd night   The bed was amazingly comfy and the hotel staff in the breakfast room were amazing they really made you feel welcome and made sure you were well looked after Ricky was particularly helpful and made us feel really welcome fantastic hotel location for Covent garden and getting around London on the underground also easy walking distance from Kings Cross

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Service in the bar was slow when not particularly busy We didn t eat in hotel so can t comment on the food or value Looked pricey   We had a small internal room so it was very quiet Reception and concierge very efficient

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Polite but nefficent check in staff size of the rooms bed size Being charged 100 G B P on my credit card when I arrived in case we used the bar or mini bar the bedroom we were given never even had a mini bar in it since when has anybody been charged for something they may receive disgraceful tried to charge us over 200 G B P more than what our bill should have been when we checked out they had our booking form no excuse there either got a refund reciept when I queried it Very disappointed from what is supposed to be a good hotel chain First bedroom we were offered postage stamp size 1 piece of furniture was undescribable threatened to leave next bedroom slightly bigger no mini bar small double bed at 218G B P a night way over priced This was at end of our long 25th wedding anniversary holiday You live and learn very disappointed   Concierge and breakfast staff efficient polite and well mannered Reception lounge and bar areas very nice pity about the bedrooms Breakfast excellent

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: I was disappointed that there was no fridge or minibar in the room although there was a small bottle of water provided on arrival which was appreciated We upgraded our room but I was surprised at how small it was I wish I had just got the basic room and saved the money as it would probably have been the same size The shower was a bit unimpressive not really very powerful   The breakfast was lovely really enjoyed and buffet style too so you could get what you wanted We had a couple of drinks in the bar area which was really lovely and comfortable The staff were really friendly and helpful Really close to the tube and on the Piccadilly line so it was only a couple of stops before you are right in the heart of Covent Garden We picked this on purpose as we were going to see a show as part of our trip

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: nice size room very clean with all the facilities you need Nice welcome cookie Very helpful with luggage able to leave when arriving departing

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Breakfast disappointing bacon and eggs were tough been standing for some time There are plenty of bakery and cafes near the hotel to compensate   Excellent staff Clean room with good pillows

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: No parking at the hotel Nearest parking is a few blocks away and at 6 pounds an hour extremely pricey Lucky for us we were planning to ditch the rental car anyway and use buses and the tube which we would highly recommend for anyone coming to stay in the city   The staff were very helpful friendly and professional at all times Response to requests for assistance were immediate Breakfast buffet was exceptional in very way Food in the restaurant was also exceptional Our room was remarkably quiet and although we could have wished for a wee bit more space in our room we know that hotel rooms in BIG cities are usually very compact We also LOVED the central location of this hotel We were ideally situated for the buses and or taking the tube and steps away from a number of fabulous pubs and restaurants a lovely park and even a few major landmarks and museums

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: No smoking terrace for guests your out side on the pavement I m afraid  Fantastic location bus tour company pick up straight out side the hotel there s also an underground car park across the road which you can receive 50 discount when staying in the Hilton amazing breakfast customer service 100

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: In view of my like comments I would like to think that all the rooms irrelevant of the style are cleaned to the same standard We will be staying again in October in twin rooms and hope that the visit is as excellent at this time  We have stayed here before in a family room and i wasnt impressed with the cleanliness This time we stayed in an executive room and it was so much better no faults at all

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Not really impressed with the position of the room with all the heating and ventilation plant outside the window Felt the room was cramped for the cost   Great location and really friendly and helpful staff

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: The price was a bit over the top for the type of room we got which was a deluxe double but not really deluxe you are paying for the location more than anything also the afternoon tea was quite cheaply made for the price 35 the cakes were just small sponges and not like advertise Sandwiches were very small and scones were dry even with the butter and jam on My wife enjoyed it though so maybe I was just being a bit picky apart from that breakfast was fantastic and plenty of choice I love the table service in the bar area too that was a good touch overall fantastic place just go elsewhere for afternoon tea   Location was great and ideal for most attractions within a short bus ride or walk

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: The room was VERY bijou for 288 but I supposed you can argue it s London would I find anywhere else cheaper   Property was very clean staff were really polite the cup of tea which is by far the most important was lovely and a really convenient location

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Tiny room and 20 cost for breakfast is a bit laughable unless it s golden slices of bacon and serves with diamond beans  The hotel staff could not have been more courteous looking after our stuff before and after our check in out timesome the rooms were tidy and our requests iron and bucket of ice were dealt wit has quickly and politely

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Our bedroom not so big with small slightly shabby bathroom Our kids rooms was nice tho   Bed was very comfy as it was my birthday they sent a bottle of fizz to both our rooms very nice gesture so did pre drinks in room before heading to the theatre Breakfast was very good staff very friendly and helpful

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Rooms are slightly smaller than what this chain of hotels usually provides for travellers with lots of luggage Nevertheless still great price for London   Amazing location Around a 10minute walk into Covent Garden itself which makes it great value for money in comparison to most central London hotels Staff were extremely helpful and lovely Would definitely stay here again and recommend

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Executive room too small and much smaller than other exec rooms in double trees Lack of facilities and benefits Outlook poor Floor dirty Maintenance decorating outside our room Smell poor Bed too smaller   Breakfast

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: The mattresses were a bit lumpy and could do with being replaced However we did sleep very well We felt that we paid a fair price for the room   Friendly and helpful staff who gave us a very good welcome as well as helping us with our day to day travel plans Our room was small but in a very quiet part of the hotel top floor with a lovely sky line view

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: What sounded like a generator kept me awake for much of the night   Room was small but very comfortable Great location and helpful staff Nice modern bathroom

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: the toast machine was very slow at breakfast the hand rail in the bath got in the way of the shower as my wife is on the large size   The staff were very helpful regarding parking had a wonderful nights sleep room was exceptional and breakfast was excellent

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Antonio was very polite and couldn t do enough for you Breakfast was very good and plenty to choose from The room was very nice and comfortable

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Carpet in room was stained scratches and dirt up the walls the door looked like someone had tried to crowbar their way out Room just looked beat up   Location itself was great cookies they gave were really tasty and reception area was nice

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: I was about to be charged 45 instead of 30 for breakfast We had two rooms which were not together but on the same floor   Cookies on arrival Friendliness of staff Breakfast

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Having to wait long periods of time for breakfast items to be re stocked   The staff were so friendly especially towards my little girl The offer of freshly baked cookies every time we went to reception was lovely

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Pillows were very soft A more substantial pillow ie memory foam would be better   The breakfast was delicious and extensive The location was perfect for theatres

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Tiny tiny bathroom which wasn t as clean as i would have liked but to be honest the cleaner probably couldn t have got inside sufficiently to clean it No room service menu ect in the room   Excellent location one tube ride from kings cross perfect for single mum to take 12 year old to theatre we walked to see Charlie and the chocolate factory and felt safe the whole time We opted out of breakfast to save money and there were lots of cheaper options on our doorstep

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: We were supposedly upgraded to a better room as it was our Anniversary however the room we were given was quite small and closely resembled a cabin on a cruise ship Made us think what size would our room have been had we not been upgraded   Very helpful staff that made you feel welcome Room service choices were good and of good quality when they arrived Close to a lot of theatre locations in West End

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Only there one night and spent limited time in hotel as out and about so nothing to dislike   THE LOCATION WAS GREAT AND THE PRICE OF THE ACCOMMODATION IT WAS A GOOD SIZE ROOM FOR THREE ADULTS AND THE BEDS WERE VERY COMFORTABLE

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: It took forever for the hot water to run through Very small lifts   Location Friendly Greeting warm cookie on arrival Issues with room very quickly resolved

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Extractor fan in bathroom on 24 7 TV switched itself on at 8am every day Cord on kettle wouldn t reach plug had to lift furniture to reach room service two small knocks then they walk in  Staff friendly nice breakfast

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: The cookies on arrival are lovely The location of the hotel was great within easy walking distance of many key parts of London if you know your way around

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Thought the room and bathroom would have been a bit bigger as it was classed as a deluxe room   Location was my highest priority and that was great Didn t do breakfast as I thought 19 50 was far too expensive we got croissant from a nearby store which was perfect for us Staff replenished tea and milk supplies promptly when asked

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Twin bedded Room was a bit small but you expect that with an older hotel   Excellent location with very friendly and helpful staff Great breakfast in the morning

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: The hotel is in need of a refurbishment The room was still ok but the bathroom was dated dirty sink smelled of canalisation and hot water did not work

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Drinks are slightly a bit too expensive but OK if you stick to beer and larger Put I suppose that London prices for you   From when we arrived we were treated well Room was clean and tidy Staff were friendly Breakfast was Excellent and staff Good choice of cereals and hot choice plus all the usual things Front of house staff very good Henri I believe his name was he was good with our cases

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Toaster at breakfast not sufficient and no signage of what setting several attempts by people to get correct setting Breakfast queuing at food stations on occasions long resulting in food cooling   Friendly accommodating staff We hope to return

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Noise and vibration from underground train Hotel facilities not explained was unaware they had a fitness suite   Location was great Staff lovely and friendly Comfortable spacious room

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: the hotel was fantastic it was well positioned for theaters and for oxford street plenty of good priced restaurants near by very comfortable Staff could not do enough for us very helpful in every way Breakfast was excellent

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: The hotel staff went out of their way to make sure everything was perfect The breakfast was phenomenal We loved the hotel and we cannot wait to visit again

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Could not fault our stay   Stayed with my son in a twin room for one night theatre break Warm welcome and equally delicious warm complimentary cookie from reception staff on check in Room very clean and comfortable Excellent choice at breakfast which serves until 10 30am which was fantastic as enabled us to have an extra snooze and shower without having to rush Very attentive friendly staff at breakfast our coffee was replenished without having to ask Will definitely stay here again when in London as very convenient for station theatre land and shops all within a ten minute stroll

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Sockets next to the bed would be useful The lighting in the room was either very bright or completely dark   Location was excellent Staff extremely friendly Facilities were very clean

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Staff excellent friendly polite and helpful Hotel rooms very comfortable clean with all that was needed bonus as our room ready early Breakfast very good with a good choice Stayed several times even when it was the Bonnington and has never failed to please Thanks

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Experience with staff is variable depending upon who is attending to you Will be leaving full review on travel sites   Good location Executive rooms are moderately sized although the baths are slightly narrow Normal twin is ok as well Good food from the bar

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: why no outlet in bathroom and dryer kept tripping circuit otherwise great room  exceptional staff who were very professional friendly and helpful room was good size and hotel location was excellent for central london

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: The temperature of the room was too high and could not be cooled down sufficiently which led to a bad nights sleep Also took two phone calls and 30minutes to have a bucket of ice sent to the room   The hotel is a lovely hotel looks great and the room was nice for a standard room The staff were very friendly and very helpful

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Storage space limited   Family room had good sized additional bed for a child adult in a partially separated section and 2 TVs Breakfast very nice indeed Excellent position for sightseeing with shops cafes and bars right outside

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Stayed for wedding anniversary staff kindly left us a bottle of bubbly and dessert They couldn t do enough for us too lovely venue staff and great location

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Rooms very small and could do with updating The bed was very uncomfortable and pillows very flat and too soft  Very nice staff good location communal areas excellent and room bathroom clean food excellent

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Small gym Trying to get to location from Heathrow Airport a pain Need to go through central London If coming from Heathrow choose something a little more West   2 bed apartment with 2 bathrooms a very good idea

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Cleanliness of floor and pillows   Had to complain first about room Booked and paid for deluxe king quiet room to find we were next to lift with double bed when I went to reception guy said what is it now then put in executive room but carpet hadn t been hoovered also pillows disgusting changed pillowcases twice but never pillows we have stayed I In this hotel previously but don t think we wi be back

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: We had an executive room free upgrade It was a decent size but I suspect standard rooms may have been quite small   Excellent hotel Clean modern and central Breakfast had a great selection and all you could eat Excellent room and comfy bed

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: The room was very small as well as the bathroom which couldn t be compared to other five stars hotel And you couldn t leave the luggage at the hotel before your check in date where I had to carry all my large luggage to travel at Scotland You wouldn t want to imagine how I took all the bags catching a train to the high land The woman staff wasn t seem to be nice when explaining this to us She didn t even smile We were staying for four nights three people But the extra bed was a sofa bed which was a bad quality spring bed that could hurt your back

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Room was a bit small and there was only a shower no bath  The bed linen was beautiful the bar was very nice the staff was very helpful The location was excellent

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: We were very shocked that the bar in the hotel was closing at 12 30 on a weekend night we came back after having a nice meal to have a quiet drink before retiring to bed but could only have 1 drink as the bar was closing but our room was lovely and breakfast was very tasty  The staff was very helpful and was always asking us if we needed anything else our original room was not suitable for us because of mine and my friends disabilities so we were offered different rooms of which they showed us first to make sure we were happy

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: we had a couple of staff at the receptionists that weren t helpful whatsoever although having said that the first time we checked in we were greeted by a really friendly receptionist and then we had to check out to go out of london when we returned for the second part of our stay we had a poor reception which was a downer   the location is gold it s so easy to catch the tube or bus to central london

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: The room is quite small but Ok compared to other London hotels super comfy room with great location in central London the staff is helpful also they serve starbucks coffee

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Room was small and tv wouldn t work or change channel due to faulty remote and signal Only afew minor downfalls but nothing at all major   The breakfast tasty and ideal to start the day Loads of options Fab location Lovely staff Ideal for the one night Expensive but reasonable for London I guess I would recommend or return

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: the room was very small and stank weird been told we have been upgraded to a bigger room I would never would like to see then the room be meant to be in D for the price we have paid definitely can get a better accommodation in a very good location   location lobby bar

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Welcoming friendly staff lovely clean room which was very quiet Visited London for my daughters 21st and this was mentioned when booking small happy birthday item sent to the room from the hotel which was a nice touch Lovely Louisa at the front desk was very helpful Overall an excellent first stay in London Thank you

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Staff on my first time checking in was really friendly and I was fortunate to have a slightly larger room on the Hilton HHonors floor and then I checked out to go out of town and came back 2 days later and had a rather impolite receptionist at the desk checking me in Came in early from Brighton and wasn t aware of the late check out time and so we weren t allowed to go to our room and receptionist her name I remember was Luiza was in no way apologetic about the situation but told me flat in the face that room is not available until 3pm such a complete contrast to the first time when I was greeted by a really polite and helpful receptionist by the name of Cristina And of course I didn t realise check out time was 11am and someone from reception actually came up to our room and knocked on the door and said check out time is 11am thank goodness we were packed and ready to leave the room anyways but the receptionist could have perhaps called to our room and told us it would have been less intrusive perhaps   Like that the location is close to central London

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: The mattress on the bed was a bit too hard for my liking but my partner loved it so not a real negative overall   In prime location with Covent Garden and shopping within a small walk away plenty of options for food nearby also

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Nothing really Breakfast seemed expensive so we went to a nearby caf which was delicious   Very comfy bed great location great caf a few doors down good sized room Concierge was very helpful when trying to get a taxi

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Our tea coffee sugar was not replaced in the room so had to go to reception to ask for more tea bags   The location was very good and staff polite and helpful

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: The 1st room I was given was awful nothing like the pictures online It was dirty with old tired fittings marks and scratches on almost every surface a shower screen that fell apart when I moved it I asked to change rooms the 2nd was marginally better with the exception of the curtains hanging off the rails no charger for my toothbrush a really poor experience with room service half my order didn t arrive and what did came without any cutlery For 241 per night for a standard double the quality of the rooms service was appalling Very disappointed for a hotel trading under the DoubleTree Hilton name There s plenty of other places on the same road stay somewhere else   The bed was comfortable the mushroom soup was delightful when it eventually arrived

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: The staff couldn t tell me where to park and ended up driving around London to only find a ridiculous priced car park the room was crammed although clean But we hardly slept due to the traffic outside and childish drivers honking the horns continously   Clean room

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: With so much to do in London we ran out of time so were very happy to discover that when we returned to the hotel at around 10 45pm we were still able to dine in the bar There was a good choice on the menu Our food arrived quickly and we enjoyed it very much Following a great night s sleep breakfast was of the highest standard with a range and quality of food that would be hard to beat Staff in all departments were most welcoming and helpful Ideally situated between King s Cross and Covent Garden this is a hotel that we have visited before and would not hesitate to do so again

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: We booked a family room that was hardly sized for a family The convertible sofa was a twin size and the room provided almost zero storage My clothes and the children s clothing did not fit anywhere There was not one dresser in the whole family room And there was space for one just under the TV in the sofa area We were forced to live out of our suitcases for an entire week which left our clothes wrinkled and difficult to find   Luisa at the front desk was wonderful to me and my parents and my two small children The tea in the lobby restaurant was lovely The cookies were a nice touch

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Nothing   We stayed in this hotel to celebrate my partner s birthday at reception we were instantly upgraded once they learned we were there for a special occasion The room was large clean and modern After 10 minutes of settling in there was a knock on the door and a birthday cake was delivered complete surprise We were made to feel very special and cannot fault the service Thank you Especially to Cristine at Reception Also the cookies were delicious
