Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: lovely greeting with a hot chocolate cookie bed super comfortable breakfast was a bit dissaponting but other than that no complaints would stay again great location

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: The bed was extremely comfortable the room was spotless all staff were friendly and the breakfast had lots of choices even gluten free and was totally delicious

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Small room Bar priced too high The toilet roll holder was in a ridiculous place on the wall opposite I am quite small and found it was a stretch for someone with small arms  Location Modern style of room

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Having to leave   From the moment we arrived we were warmly welcomed Having informed the receptionist it was our Ruby wedding anniversary we were delighted to receive a bottle of red wine delivered to our room We stayed in a junior suite which was superb

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: We booked a family room it was a strange format with no cot bed we asked when we got there and it was provided quickly The lift was out of order and we had to use the service lift not great with a pram Saturday only These things happen   staff were excellent friendly helpful and attentive

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Room was an executive suite very hard mattress and the room was very tired and in need of care and attention really let themselves down  The staff and location excellent and the choice of breakfast

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: The room was a massive let down for my husband and I It was very small and there was no curtain or blind in the toilet which was very unsettling   The entrance way to the hotel is beautiful and grand and the warm cookie was a nice touch

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Nothing special but if I tell you small thing shower pressure was bit weak   The receptionists were so kind and felt proffesional hospitality It s unusual at London hotel Specially Maria who helped me when checked in was the best receptionist I had ever met She tried to meet my requests as much as possible when I asked her upgrage my room with specil discount rate I was so touched by her hospitality I d like to say thank you to her using this opportunity Other staffs are all helpful and friendly as well I will definitely stay this hotel again

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: The room was short on space not much of view  The staff are very helpful can t do enough for you hotel is nice modern lovely and location brill to travel round london

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: WiFi intermittent also bottled water was not replaced in room I have never been in a hotel where this has happened before   Good choice at breakfast Staff very helpful

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Nothing  Excellent stay Staff so friendly and helpful Only prob they couldn t stop the rain lol It was daughters 21 so upgraded to executive room and free breakfast Warm cookies on arrival was a nice touch too The breakfast was amazing and so much choice

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Room a bit small bed was against the wall   Bed very comfy and breakfast was very good with plenty of choice Room very clean and modern staff very attentive Tea and coffee available in room and toiletries

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Our first room was so small we had to ask to be moved The next room was big with 2 double beds but apart from some hanging space in a wardrobe no drawers or extra space to store non hanging garments Bathroom small Gives the Hilton group a bad name

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: The room was pretty dated and dark and not what I was expecting really Felt like it needed modernising The beds were very soft but comfy enough The shower was very poor   Great location staff were friendly LOVED the warm cookie on arrival Check in and out very efficient and provided us toothbrush as we forgot ours

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Rooms were very quiet you couldn t hear any noise Staff at breakfast we very accommodating as one as our party had allergies nothing was too much trouble

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: No real issues  The staff were extremely friendly They upgraded our room and had a happy Birthday cake waiting for my wife when we entered the room I still don t know how they knew about her birthday I didn t tell them The location is good also

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: This hotel provided everything we needed central location comfort and value for money But most of all the staff couldn t have been more pleasant or helpful what a refreshing change for a central London hotel Well done Hilton

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: After staying enjoyably and without complaint at your hotels last year in our U S tour we were extremely disappointed with this visit We were told at reception that we were Honours guests and would get free wi Fi as our reward It transpires everyone gets this The room was small and cramped and there was a large food like stain on the carpet You couldn t even renew the two tiny bottles of complementary water on the second night Quite frankly it was less enjoyable than a Travel Lodge which at least is honest about its value   Loction

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Using hairdryer was inconvenient as it could not be plugged closer to a mirror   Relatively quiet environment pleasant and helpful staff amenities were adequate

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Nothing  Staff were incredibly polite friendly and helpful On learning it was my wife s birthday we were offered a room upgrade complimentary breakfast and a small birthday cake delivered to the room Couldn t believe it Hotel was smart room was clean and comfortable and well equipped Breakfast was excellent with plenty of choices and attentive service Hotel is well positioned for West End and we walked to South Bank in 25 minutes Overall a very positive experience thanks to all staff at DoubleTree for making it a memorable stay

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Rooms not very clean d cor was very tired Bar staff encouraged doubles all the time room service didn t happen until requested no clean towels until requested

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: We ordered room service on the first evening of our stay and we were very disappointed With a total cost of 40 we had a nice but like warm burger and 6 hard very pale chips which were advertised as 3 times cooked Being a chef it was clear to see these had not been cooked once properly let alone 3 times I had a very important social event on the Saturday evening with 14 colleagues the plan was to eat in the Resturant in the hotel followed by afternoon tea on the Sunday unfortunately after the room service we opted for an alternative venue I did speak to reception who refunded the service charge on the meal but never the less we expected a lot more from such a high profile hotel The breakfasts were outstanding and again the staff fantastic Had it not been for the room service out stay would have been perfect Thank you  The staff were fantastic so helpful and welcoming The room was cold to start with but a member of staff soon came to show us how to operate the heating system

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Bed and room could have been bigger Plus we were on the first floor at the front and so had quite a bit of road noise during the night   Staff were excellent price was good for location facilities on site were good too All in all a great stay

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Welcome cookie was amazing As was the breakfast staff hotel and location Only tiny complaint was that the hot and cold taps were round the wrong way

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Three of us in one room but only two of everythng cups snacks gowns slippers toiletries   Friendly and helpful staff Enjoyed the cookie and great breakfast Lovely clean room

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Staff were very pleasant and very helpful especially the Check in lady I believe to be menerva and also she checked us out The gentleman running the breakfast on the 08 05 was also very friendly and helpful

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Great location for my needs very comfortable bed and great breakfast The staff were very nice in particular Tina at check in and out she even sent a cake to our room as it was my wife s birthday Really impressed

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Nothing  Well it was lovely really enjoyed the stay their Staff were very obliging and helpful Breakfast was excellent and very enjoyable so all n all very good xx

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: The room was decent sized however if I had to be picky a bigger room wouldn t go a miss   The room was welcoming and the location was central Also the warm welcoming cookies were a delight

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Room was hot Agreed it was during a hot spell but I was unable to lower the temperature past 17 degrees If the room I was originally put in is what I paid for its not value for money  Location was ideal for me When I complained that my room was too small I was moved to a bigger room

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Unable to securely connect my shaver lead into the shaver socket in the bathroom Very minor point I would stay there again without hesitation   Location and room

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Our room was tiny bed up against wall Reception staff not at all helpful  Location great breakfast delicious waiting staff in bar restaurant excellent

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Nothing every thing was perfect  Absolutely amazing staff so friendly from the minute we arrived loved our room hotel location just wished we had stayed longer we will be back asap We stayed here for our daughters 18th birthday and you exceeded all of our expectations can t thank you enough

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Small room looked a little bit worn the cobwebs around the room 131  Bed was comfy room was small and had cobwebs low ceiling so shouldn t of been there for 300 a night lobby was beautiful breakfast was lovely

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: feels quite outdated the tower hill double tree is much nicer and cheaper when I ve been in the past  Good location very friendly staff at front desk and in the bar

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: The rooms where quite small and bed was quite hard for me  Great check in service with a cookie on arrival Fantastic location close to Holborn station and walking distance to Covent Garden Overall would stay again just for the location

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: The hotel is situated in a great location just walking distance from the likes of Covent Garden and Oxford Street The staff were all very friendly and our room was clean ad comfortable The breakfast was a buffet full of variety even a gluten free section We would certainly stay again The cookie on arrival was a nice touch

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Air conditioning and heater directly located over the bed therefore blowing directly in the direction of your face  The staff is really kind and incredibly available

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: The window didn t work so noisy at night it was very warm in rooms even with a c on No pancakes at breakfast or maple syrup  Location and size of room

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: tight fit in bathroom getting in and out manouvering the shower door over bath  very nice welcome at reception as it was raining when I arrived and I was offered a warm towel to dry my face hair

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Booked a double room this time it s worth paying the extra to upgrade to an executive room there s lots more space  great hotel in a ideal location Breakfast was lovely and staff attentive

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: I had to pay to check in to a dirty room 3rd room in was ok room service was terrible to I wouldn t stay there again  Breakfast was nice That s about it though

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: We always stay here during our trip to London each year and would not come back time and again if there was something we didn t like   The staff were so friendly and accommodating The room was clean and the bed comfortable The breakfast was very good Afternoon tea was lovely Check in was quick and the room was ready for us when we arrived

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Being woken very early on Sunday morning with deliveries which were directly below the bedroom window   Room was spacious and well equipped The beds were comfortable The reception staff were extremely friendly and helpful

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Not the most modern hotel the lobby is really nice but the rooms especially the bathroom was outdated and not really clean old sink is difficult to clean   Location is excellent walking distance to Pancras and the West End

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: I had said when booking the hotel it was our anniversary and feel free to do anything to make Katie s stay special So if we arrived and flowers or chocolates had been left on the bed on our arrival or two glasses of wine to make it feel that little bit special then I would have paid the cost of this but no nothing was done   The bed was absolutely what the doctor ordered after walking around London all day A foot spa would have been perfect

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Only down side was the pancake machine was out of order Which my grandson really wanted to try out   Beds and pillows were so comfortable I had a really good nights sleep Staff were all very friendly Breakfast was very nice Would definitely recommend this hotel

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Room a little on the small side but not uncomfortably so Reception area and throughout hotel the heating was too high for my liking being very picky   Staff friendly and helpful Great location Decent value

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Few continental items at breakfast and rolls not always available   Very decent English breakfast Got a very nice room to replace the initial one which was without AC Helpful and friendly personnel Very convenient location

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: There was a problem throughout our stay with the hot water No type of refund or perhaps a dinner voucher was offered We stayed 3 nights 3 out of the four showers I got were ice cold There was a notification on our tv to run the water an extra ten mins but this only catered for one shower Having a massive throat and chest infection at the time the cold showers only prolonged my recovery   The location was superb and the staff especially at the buffet breakfast that greeted us were extremely friendly and helpful

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Room was very small Good for one person   Love the cookie at the entrance Very small room but has everything you would need Kettle coffee hot chocolate iron with board hair dryer etc

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Totally inaccessible room lack of knowledge of any requests you may have asked for Next room offered was equally bad but more accessible because of shape Filthy bedside table and lifts tiny Very average breakfast Certainly poor value for money especially with the room we were given In fact we cut our stay short as we were so disappointed with the whole scenario Receptionist staff could hardly speak English which was very frustrating too Damp patch on ceiling and could hear drips in the bedroom   Sheets were clean and bed quite comfy

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: You can get breakfast for a third of the cost elsewhere I would also like to see menus for room service   The rooms were nicely furnished with everything you would need

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: The double room was small wasn t as spacious as we were expecting but didn t spend all our time there and was comfy to stay in Also no fridge in our room to keep drinks or small snacks but again this was copable   Staff were absolutely fantastic nothing was too big of a job to them Each member of staff greeted you everytime they saw you and had a smile on their face no matter what time of day Breakfast was lovely too a variety of different types off food depending what you fancied that morning and again service fantastic too

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Could not fault the hotel at all and have already recommended you to friends and this is not something i have ever said of a hotel in London as there is always something to moan about  All staff were extremely friendly Bedroom spotless Lounge Bar area first class with good atmosphere and waitresses very helpful Near to Euston and the theatres and good restaurants nearby You pleased my wife so you must be a good hotel Breakfast was excellent and again staff very attentive

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Rooms feel claustrophobic and were disappointing in comparison to other Hilton hotels we have stayed in  Staff were pleasant and helpful Breakfast good

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Room 231 heating air conditioning didn t work at all not at all good for the rateing of the hotel This should be checked before guests arrive I can only presume our room was above kitchen as you could hear quite a bit of noise from below from quite early Desk in room had been turned round as drawers were missing Lights on the right hand side of the bed were hit miss  Location

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Noisy generators directly outside the room window The view from the window of both rooms was disappointing but it did not impact on our overall enjoyment   The staff were so helpful and kind Luisa on reception was amazingly helpful to us as were all staff They couldn t do enough for us

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Bed was slightly uncomfortable   Nice and clean rooms Despite being close to a busy road it was quiet Very close to a lot of amenities in the centre of London

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Requires second chair in room rather than relying on bed for the second person TV not picture not brilliant required a reset every 20 minutes or so   Very courtious staff Excellent choices of breakfast

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: When booking few months before I asked for a quiet room they give me one facing the street Airco makes lot of noise and temperature regulation does not work I had to leave early and could not have breakfast but they refused to reimburse me Breakfast is not great for the price charged 15 and one has to wait in line like in one of the budget hotels   Location is good and staff is very friendly

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: No hot water engineer turned up at 6pm on night 2 of 2 Great timing considering most people are out during the day Rooms are tiny Some lifts not working Doors have no acoustic insulation making it very noisy   The bar area is nice

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Honestly i didn t find one thing that bothered me  a The location was excellent we were within walking distance for all the major attractions b All the staff and i mean all of them were pleasant friendly and helpful c The bar prices were similar to that of Newcastle city center so no shock when we ordered drinks d The Porters were great

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Rooms were very small We had three rooms all very spaced out even though booking has been completed weeks ago Check in was very slow Food at night was very mediocre  The bed was comfortable The cookies on arrival were very welcome Large area in reception with nice lounge Excellent breakfast with omelette made on demand Able to access bus outside hotel

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Luke warm water not hot enough to have a shower or bath on the evening or morning despite running water for 15 minutes to see if it would warm up Complained to reception Didn t seem to understand my issue foreign worker My colleague who also stayed at the hotel had the same issue and was moved to a different room on complaining Also booked a single room which really was tiny with little room to move around There wasn t enough room to pull the chair out and sit at the dressing table   Breakfast was good quality bed comfortable and cosy

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Room was not ready at 345 despite being told I could book in by 3 Bed very uncomfortable Cold water whilst showering in the morning   Staff were friendly and helpful

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Only issues I had was the muffins were stale on our second morning there and was looking forward to a fresh muffin for breakfast apart from That amazing hotel   Everything Really modern nice room would come back

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Frankly I cannot find anything to complain about whatsoever Warm greeting Efficient and helpful staff Nothing too much trouble However would have appreciated another couple of tea bags I did ask but they didn t materialise   All in all a very comfortable stay Close to our theatre and a reasonable taxi ride to our choice of destination for meet up with friends

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: We were a little disappointed that there was no cocktails available  The staff within the hotel were there at every opportunity to cater for your needs so happy friendly and helpful The variety and quality of food for breakfast was faultless We also got room service which was presented in no time at all

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Bar staff very young and poorly trained A double should at least fill the metal measuring cup not be 1 2 below the rim   Good pillows very friendly help at the front desk

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Not enough bar staff so there was a long wait for service  Good location friendly staff compact room but nowhere near as bad as many single rooms in central London

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: No hot water at 11pm Monday night Luke warm water for shower at 9am Tuesday Fixed by maintenance man by 9 30am but meant we had little time to shower and breakfast as it shut by 10am   Reception and maintenance man dealt with our lack of hot water issues efficiently and pleasantly

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: I was VERY dissapointed with the room for the price i payed travelodge rooms are bigger just as comfortable with a bigger bed and they are cheaper if you get what you pay for im going to travelodge next time i stay in London overall feeling of being charged 156 for 1 night and nearly 40 for 2 breakfasts because they could and not because they are special even though they are a Hilton hotel i will NOT stay in any hilton hotels again and i would not recommend them either  The warm friendly welcoming staff and the delicious warm cookies

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: The room was so small and hot Definitely need to upgrade the air con systems or reduce room rate Absolutely tiny   Loved the cookie and apple touch On check in the staff were great however the rest of the stay not so much Room was clean location was excellent

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Room was very cold despite having the aircon turned off There was no hot water to speak of despite running it as advised for more than 10 minutes an incredible waste of water the room door did not lock at all Did discount the bill at checkout but I suspect they knew the room was below par   Location

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Room was cold but extra heater was supplied without delay Mattress was worn and uncomfortable  The reception staff were friendly efficient and well trained Some issues we raised were dealt with very well indeed Special thanks to Receptionist Tina and Reception Manager whose name we have lost

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Getting a room on the first floor while very loud music downstairs You should warn people beforehand and reduce the price for such rooms We just could not sleep

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: The soap holder grab rail was poorly placed in the shower area and constantly caught my elbow on it   The staff was very friendly and the hotel room and lobby was very smart The location very well situated too

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Room very clean and comfortable staff were professional efficient and welcoming location is perfect for theatres galleries restaurants and shops

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Breakfast was ok but not great Would have liked more choice on the continental section i e salmon English breakfast not particularly hot   Room was spacious and comfy beds Bar area and staff very good

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Room was a delux however wasn t over impressed as no sky TVs and NO view what so ever We looked out onto the back of another building and a boiler roof  Staff were excellent and so friendly and helpful Couldn t fault them at all

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Food ridiculous price thank goodness very good eateries nearby  Staff there to please clean and the location was perfect walking distance to theatre and museum but quiet lots of amenities near

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: The bed was not very comfortable It had slightly sunken in  The location was good very near to the Holborn tube station and the hotel was luxurious and clean

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Breakfast buffet was ok but not great If you re scared if small spaces then the elevators could worry you   Great hotel for a weekend trip easy to find and near Holborn tube station so pretty central for all the main sights Rooms were spacious for London and clean and staff helpful

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: rooms were very small lack of privacy as we could hear peole talking in the corridor there were stains on the carpet cable for kettle was too small to plug it to nearest socket had to move kettle to dressing table staff was okay no good eough as after my complain to them regarding issues over the phone only thing i heard it sorry they did not even bother to come and see what i was complaining abt infact i was left with the option to change the hotel if i was as per Manager s suggestion   location

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: no cookie on check in they did apologise but it is a quirky feature of the company room was very small standard size for London I guess  very clean central location large bed

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Although very nice and comfortable the room was not quite big enough to be considered a family room The spare bed was squeezed in   Very nice room Super breakfast

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Only thing I found annoying someone knocking on the door each morning waking us up We didn t ask for any wake up call or have a card on the door   Room was comfy staff were amazing so polite and helpful would recommended 100

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: The room was clean and the bed was very comfy but the shower wasn t great and there was only a small wardrobe so no space for our cases or all our belongings as we was there for 4 days  The location is fantastic easy access to Holborn and the staff were all genuinely interested in how we was and our stay was

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: The fact we wanted breakfast in bed and the hotel didn t supply so we had to rush down for breakfast  The location was ideal for us and very accessible to the theatre and Covent Garden

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Some double rooms are to small for two people   Brilliant stay Rooms are a bit smaller than expected All staff were very helpful Christina and adber we delt with and the customer service given by them was excellent Well done both Would stay at this hotel again

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Friendly staff and we got upgraded to a double deluxe for my husbands birthday when we got to the room there was a slice of birthday cake and a card signed by staff waiting for him it s these little details that stick in your memory and impress you

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: We arrived and there were no towels The printer had an issue and so we couldn t print directly but the staff helped us to print in the reception   Location and nice attention from staff

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: The bathroom finishes cracked tiles and mould around junctions and general standard of cleanliness The heating system poor controls The room was cold If you want the photos we ve got them   Reception and Bar

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: I stayed two times in this hotel first time experience was not so good the room was small and not clean properly AC not working bit disappointed Accidentally I book again and what a great surprise everything opposed based on 2n experience I will recommend this hotel

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Our Double bedroom was slightly on the small side but for one night it was adequate  Staff very welcoming with a cookie Good choice of beakfast and times Check out quick and efficient and was told hope to see you again

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Was a bit shocked a the drink prices but that s cause we are not used to it   The hotel is clean the staff are polite and couldn t do enough for you We had a very pleasant stay and couldn t find a fault at all

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: My elderly parents were unable to use the upper bedroom in the 1 bedroom apartment due to the tight and steep staircase There was no warning that this could be a problem with anyone who has walking difficulties at time of booking   Liked the welcome cookie and the fact that our room was available before 3pm

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Didn t get cookies on arrival like promised Breakfast service was terrible Room was very small and cramped  The lobby bar downstairs was lovely and cosy The fireplace was a nice touch Bed was comfortable

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: The bedside tables were not clean The room appeared to be pristine but we kept sneezing and I am allergy to dust and the body can detect that When we wiped the bedside tables we then saw there was a this thin layer of dust there  Cozy bed and nice hotel as a whole

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Great location only a short walk from Piccadilly and Soho which will quickly take you further south to the area around the Parliament and Big Ben A wonderful breakfast with great personel and clean rooms

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Room was exceptionally clean and spacious we were in the executive suite section However as we upgraded to a nice room I didn t expect to look out at a brick wall   Excellent customer service Very friendly obliging staff Good location Very clean and comfortable accommodation

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: The room was a nice size and had things we needed such as iron and hair dryer however it was cold each time we came back to the room   The hotel was in a great location for what we had planned and the staff were very helpful They allowed us to check in very early in the day when we arrived without having to wait til later that afternoon The breakfast the following morning was nice

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: The room not made up until 5 25pm on a Sunday when a notice was left on the door at 10 30am The very high prices charged for drinks and food The lack of hot water for the time of stay   The location of hotel the relaxed atmosphere of the bar lounge

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: My son burnt his hand on the tap water that was boiling hot and he needed a burns dressing The bed was like a rock and I ended with a bad back  Breakfast and devor

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: An absolute disgrace on entry to the room it was freezing because the window was open the heating was broken and they knew and the toilet was soiled I was moved to a dingy single room and was not charged The next room was small but warm however I ve never been in a large bed that was so uncomfortable by this time I d had enough left in a rush and was charged around 100 overall a very disappointing experience

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: We weren t allowed to buy coffee non alcohol drink from the bar in the evening despite it being open The staff on the front desk said that we had to be authorised to put it on our room tab which shouldn t have been an issue We wouldn t have minded paying in cash but this wasn t allowed either which doesn t really make sense   I thought it was a nice touch to receive a free freshly baked cookie upon arrival The room and decor were lovely and surprisingly spacious I thought the quality and variety of food in the breakfast buffet was excellent and staff made effort to cater to my dietary needs

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Very convenient for all major attractions Comfortable beds with good facilities i e Tea making snacks full range of t v programmes Excellent choice on breakfast menu

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Dirty bathroom smell of sewerage from sink Water had to be run for 10 minutes before it was warm enough to shower Broken glass on bedroom floor Workman wanting access to room to measure furniture while we were in bed Had to order room service in person at reception because no one took credit card details when we checked in Issues reported to reception but not resolved   Staff friendly although not necessarily helpful warm cookie on arrival was a nice touch

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Shower didn t run very hot Street was a little noisy during day but can t complain as I wasn t sleeping   It was a very modern and clean hotel Great location walking distance was good to most of central tourist spots Local amenities were great cafes bars and shops Tube station was only down the road so easy to get about around London Holborn Station had great links for Picadilly Line and Central Line The room was spacious and modern well lit Staff were really friendly and helpful Left a Happy Birthday message and cake in room as it was my 21st birthday which was a nice touch

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Nowhere to pull up and unload luggage before parking  Staff was super helpful and very accommodating It was my friend s birthday they made a special effort with a birthday cake on arrival in the room which was a lovely surprise

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: The room service could be better The beds were made and the bathroom was clean but the hairdryer and the iron was never put back in the cupboards and the condiments coffee tea hot chocolate draw wasn t fully restocked everyday   The location was amazing It s very central so it was easy for us to travel to many places The staff members at the front desk as well as the concierge were very friendly and helpful

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: The staff were extremely friendly and helpful The room was very clean and comfortable Location was excellent I informed the hotel it was my husbands birthday and every effort was made to make our stay really special

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: The quilt cover was dirty Only saw on second pm Also it was expensive over new year Cheaper with breakfast when visited earlier in year   The location

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Heating control system of the room could be better 1 long dinner service at restaurant on Monday   Express check in and check out Staff kindness Peace of the room Comfortable bed and pillar Breakfast choice

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: We were given a free upgrade to an Executive Room and 2 free full breakfasts Amazing since it was in London and so near to Christmas and we had booked already at a discount price many Thanks

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: The lifts took a long time and the concierge was never there but reception staff were very helpful and cheerful   Location was perfect for theatre shopping river etc Breakfast was great although a little under staffed and stressed

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Staff super friendly couldn t do enough for you Nice clean room and the Holborn location is fab 10 min walk to Covent Garden 2 min walk from the tube Will definitely stay again next time I m in London

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Room was on the lower ground floor with window facing onto a brick wall despite paying extra for an executive room Service at breakfast was average had to repeatedly ask for tea coffee food trays were left un replenished for long periods particularly scrambled eggs prices in bar a complete rip off tried to charge 16 60 for a beer and a glass of wine when same drinks half an hour earlier were 12 49 Eventually reluctantly accepted previous price   only the location

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Rooms were extremely small No room to move no floor mat in shower no pressure in shower bathroom very dated  location bar and communal areas excellent as was breakfast rooms a big let down Premier inn locally half the price and twice the size and quality as in the actual room Not what i expect from Hilton

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: There were not enough towels on arrival our room wasn t cleaned until 4 pm on our second day and again insufficient towels We went to the bar but unfortunately draft beer was not available due to problems   The hotel was in a perfect location for us loads to do see and great location for plenty of bars restaurants Tube station was minutes away The hotel itself provided a very seemless check in the Doubletree Cookie on arrival The room was clean tidy with ample space and a humongous bed We had problems with not enough towels room being cleaned and also there was no draft beer due to problems otherwise it would have been better rating Breakfast was very nice

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Didn t speak to a single member of staff who was fluent in English Housekeeping left our door ajar   Comfortable bed clean room and modern bathroom

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Not clean enough The kettle was filled with cleaning materials something like soap I had occasionally found it and rinsed more than 10 times but the cleaning materials was still not removed Finally I asked for a new one   The staff is very professional

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Some very undisciplined revellers at 3 00 am possibly Hen party Not of course the hotel s fault but I m prompted to question where the responsibility lies Quite alarming on one s floor   Location helpful staff and excellent breakfasts

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Bathroom had mildew in the shower cubical shower draw was broken and when we used the shower there was an awful smell from the drain  Staff were wonderful breakfast was fantastic

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Restaurant serving staff did not seem very well organised or trained Wrong food was brought to my table Took a long time trying to get their attention to order another drink and dessert   Very comfortable Bed very quite

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Bathroom no selves our toilet bags had to sit on the floor no hot water toilet too near door Sandwiches served in the Bar were tasteless  Room was OK but not worth the money Breakfast was very good

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: We stayed in a deluxe room After staying in a normal double room in this hotel before I was very disappointed The room was not as impressive as I had hoped and was not worth the 400 I paid for a 2 night stay The room was average size with all the same facilities of any other room the bathroom tiles were cracked in some places and the shower flooded the room every time it was used no matter how careful we were The room it s self was very dull and could use a lick of paint and maybe some colour to make it less depressing Would have preferred to have stayed in a premier inn as the Hilton was not worth the amount of money that I paid for it

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: poor service from reception staff Room service spilt a whole glass of wine in my room and left me to clean it up with a towel from the bathroom Was asked go to reception to put a credit card in to enable me to order room service when I said I was not happy to get dressed had just had a bath and go down to reception to do this they quickly just took the money from the card I had booked the room with so why the fuss about it Not the sort of service I would expect from a Hilton just another mediocre hotel Room very smal with tired decor   Breakfast was good

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Awful room Just by the lift which made a racket all night every time the doors opened Air conditioning didn t work Bed so short I couldn t lie down straight

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Our room therostat did not operate it took 2 days to get it to operate properly The electric shaver point in the bathroom did not work   Very friendly staff Great Choc Cookies

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: We were less than 12h at the hotel The room and toilet were rather small and there was dust when we closed the curtains   Friendly staff Very good welcome cooking Breakfast was rather decent

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Our room was a double but a little small one side was against the wall which was awkward getting in and out for the poor person who got that side of the bed my husband lol   We stayed on a bed and breakfast basis which proved a good choice as the breakfast was really good All the staff we friendly and helpful from the cleaning staff waiting staff and reception Walking distance from Euston station and the theatre

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: The fact that I had to call the reception every time I had to get into my room as the key card didnt always work That s quite frustratiing after a long work day   The room was warm clean and comfortable

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Nothing if being picky bar service was a little slow  Staff very welcoming even brought cake to our room for my daughter s birthday Lovely touch Will definitely stay again

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: We were a little disappointed with the room as it was quite small We had booked a deluxe double and cannot see that we got what we ordered We are not sure of the difference and didn t query this as the room was only being used as a base for 1 night but if we had booked a longer stay we would have been very disappointed   Staff were very helpful Location was good and facilities good also

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Ran out of my favourite drink at the bar Amaretto very minor point though   Excellent clean accommodation Friendly staff very pleasant experience

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: The housekeeping staff was slow to clean the room one day it didn t get cleaned until after 5 30 in the afternoon   The location could not have been better for us

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: The double room I booked was smaller expected based on previous visits almost a single with a double bed fitted it to the same space The price was also some 50 60 more I don t know why   The location is ideal for my needs Easy walking distance from restaurants and transport connections

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: The room seemed smaller than the stated size No drawer space and overall the decor and furniture was more tired than I expected v the price paid   Breakfast was excellent All staff polite and helpful

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Bland and business like no wow factor and staff although efficient are not very engaging   We were pleased with the location and the fact that they acknowledged our anniversary with a card some bubbly and cake The hotel was clean

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Initial room offered was too small and not what I would call a double deluxe but after speaking to receptionist she moved us very quickly without any problem

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Our experience was spoilt by the room temperature The room thermostat was turned to its lowest level of 17 c But the air conditioning was not ever reaching the desired temperature For 2 nights me and my wife didn t sleep so ultimately spoilt our stay as we were tired throughout the day We requested a fan which was supplied to us which worked for a short period until it was generally blowing the warm air around the room Very uncomfortable 2 days stay Were not usually ones to complain but the room temperature spoilt our mini vacation

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Discretionary 12 5 service charge  The staff were exceptionally helpful when we asked for a better room than the one that had been allocated to us and we weren t charged for the upgrade

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: We decided to upgrade from a double to deluxe double and were severely disappointed Not only was the deluxe room one of the smallest we ve stayed at in this country it was also unclean There were 2 quite big coffee I hope it was anyway stains on the carpet and bath sealant missing mouldy We complained to reception and were told they could not move us because the hotel was full After much negotiation they finally knocked some money off but the size of the room for a Hilton was small   Henri at reception was polite helpful Breakfast was good

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: The rooms our old and dated with stained carpeting There was only one hook to hang our wet towels after a shower concierge booked a trip to stone henge for us and the bus ended up dumping us off on the other side of the city where we had to pay 25 Euro to get back to our hotel I complained to the concierge and they said someone would contact me It has been almost a month and no one has   The staff was friendly and helpful The lobby was very nice and updated I also liked the location as it is walking distance to Starbucks and the British Museum

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: We didn t get rooms together on the same floor Rooms weren t ready till check in I know that s the policy but I have been in some hotels that will have them ready early   Our executive room was excellent Liked the free apple service Breakfast

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Staff did not know the area when we asked questions which bus to take were to eat etc when checking out i was not asked if our stay was ok or did we have any problems just took my money and said good bye never once asked if we were happy with everything  Location room

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: We booked three deluxe doubles one of which was half the size of the other rooms this was a small double at best with a faulty door lock no fridge and a safe that didn t work we are very disappointed with the room   The location was great as was the breakfast

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Paid for a upgrade ended up with a noisy next to busy thoroughfare room with broken air conditioning  Staff were friendly and helpful location was good

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: I have no complains at all   Staff were very friendly and helpful The room and hotel were great They were both very clean and tidy at all times I would and have reccommended

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: I had a poor experience at check in I was not told where breakfast would be served or where the gym was On check out there was a complication on gaining a receipt for room service This took 3 weeks to be resolved   The location was excellent near plenty of good restaurant and very close to many of London s attractions My stay was very comfortable and the room and hotel was spotless In general staff where polite

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: My toilet kept blocking up and service was slow to fix it It was not resolved properly during my stay   Bed was comfortable and the breakfasts were lovely The location was brilliant

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Rooms could use a refurbish especially the bathroom had some mold wear and tear marks   Great staff especially very helpful receptionist Pantelis doing his best to accommodate our needs Nice room and good size for London standards Great location close to the tube and city center

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Room condition Very small with a double bed pushed up to the wall Decor required attention Curtains would not close and hung off the window needed hooks and putting on runners Windows require attention seals This would also reduce room noise  Front of house staff helpful

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: The lifts were very small and we struggled to fit two of us and a bag in The shower just dribbled out which was a little frustrating   The reception staff on arrival were excellent The beds were amazingly comfortable Check out process was very easy

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: The room is very small for the price Bathroom is also small I don t know what s London hotels are like but for a four star hotel I expect everything to be provided There are no bedroom slippers no bathrobes no toothbrush and no toothpaste The shower screen doesn t prevent floors from flooding   I like that the staff were friendly and helpful It s also in the middle of two tube stations The cookies given were warm and delicious Beds and pillows were comfortable Soaps and shampoos provided were great albeit small in amount

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: The rooms are a little cramped and can develop a bit of a dank smell if the air conditioning is turned off for long The wi fi seems to break down quite often   The location is great within a short walk of the British Museum and the theatre district

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Lower ground room meant below ground so a concrete wall immediately outside the window Zero view and quite claustrophobic Smell of drains not pleasant either Could hear tube trains from the room but not enough to reply disturb   Clean Good location for West end and Covent Garden Short walk to Holborn tube

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: very clean brilliant location for exploring centre of London no more than 20 mins from anything Excellent service Had a problem with a shirt not being returned from Laundry in time for Afternoon tea at the Ritz Hotel not only arranged but also paid for another shirt to be brought to my room Great service

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: Really small rooms and the shower has terrible water pressure which makes it difficult to wash long hair   The staff was very friendly and the lobby bar is comfortable to work and relax Location of the hotel is fine

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: We have stayed at this hotel several times and always been very pleased but on this occasion it was a complete disaster We paid for an upgraded Deluxe Double Room with a bath and asked for a ground floor room if possible We were told on arrival that we were to have a further complimentary upgrade but were then put in a horrible attic room with no bath The glass shower door was off its runners and fell on me while in the shower very dangerous There was mould in the shower and no slip mat The air conditioning did not work properly There was no hot water on the first evening The chambermaid forgot to clean the room and after two complaints we only got access to it at 4 45 pm on the second day One of the receptionists spoke very little English so communication was nearly impossible The bar ran out of gin I pursued all of my complaints on Checkout and was given a credit for one night s bar bill I get the impression that the problem is bad overall management of what is essentially a good hotel   Ambiance and location very good Food excellent

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End
Full_Review: The pillows were feather and as a Agatha suffer I ended up with a bad chest The quilts were double bed size double over on a single bed which made them to heavy and to hot  The staff were lovely

Hotel_Name: DoubleTree by Hilton London West End

Hotel_Name: Hotel d Orsay Esprit de France
Full_Review: I was a bit confused with the lighting arrangement There was a lamp next to the door that switch on and off at random We couldn t find how to turn it off except of one that switched off all lamps in the room It wasn t a big deal though and have we stayed longer I guess we could just had asked the front desk   The room was modern ample for Paris standards and well furnished The location is superb for anyone visiting Paris for its central attractions Louvre Champ Elysees Notre Dame all within easy walking distances

Hotel_Name: Hotel d Orsay Esprit de France
Full_Review: The club room was a little on the small size but had everything we required  Excellent location helpful and friendly staff free safe and air conditioning we would certainly return

Full_Review: Room was a bit small but it did just fine   Hotel staff was very nice and helpful Location was great with a short walk to both the Louvre Orsay and two metro stops very close by

Full_Review: Nothing will book again without hesitation   Great location really friendly and helpful staff in perfect location to walk to any of the major attractions

Hotel_Name: Hotel d Orsay Esprit de France
Full_Review: Nothing  Incredible location within walking distance to all the main tourist hotspots Staff were very friendly and helpful Room was extremely comfortable and very clean Highly recommended

Hotel_Name: Hotel d Orsay Esprit de France
Full_Review: Maybe a bit more light in the bathroom wonderful 5 day stay   Bed fabulous AC wonderful Quiet sleeping Bathroom clean and amenities nice The STAFF was exceptionally helpful friendly and kind The breakfast was excellent fresh food delicious dried fruit juices coffee so wonderful

Hotel_Name: Hotel d Orsay Esprit de France
Full_Review: Paris is expensive hence this as a 4 hotel also seems expensive but it is I think reasonable in context We had a very pleasant and enjoyable stay The hotel is thoughtfully and tastefully arranged with good attention to detail and the staff were very friendly

Hotel_Name: Hotel d Orsay Esprit de France
Full_Review: Hotel D Orsay is in a very convenient location a quiet street just a half block from the Seine It s easy walking distance to the Louvre Place de la Concorde and the heart of St Germain as well as to several Metro stations The staff is extremely friendly and welcoming Each time we came back to the hotel it was like coming home Our room was also a good size bigger than what I had expected for Paris It was nicely and comfortably furnished in a homey way you will definitely not feel like you re in a chain hotel here Overall we had an excellent stay and would definitely come back next time we re in Paris

Hotel_Name: Hotel d Orsay Esprit de France
Full_Review: The shuttle to CDG is 60 so we took the train for 10 each The train is so easy and right across the street   We had an very quiet room with a small garden view The staff was very gracious and accommodated our lack of ability to speak French The location is central with easy access to all of Paris I only wish I could go back again next year

Hotel_Name: Hotel d Orsay Esprit de France
Full_Review: Breakfast wasn t amazing and the breakfast room was very hot with stuffy air The room was tiny even though it was supposed to be deluxe which isn t the smallest available with the toilet door right next to the bed Although we asked for a twin room what we got was a room with two single beds pushed together so we had to move the furniture ourselves to put some space in between the beds which made the room even smaller   The best location possible Easy access to main attractions transport shopping areas and of course restaurants

Hotel_Name: Hotel d Orsay Esprit de France
Full_Review: The area is very quiet with a lack of bars shops etc We loved it but may not be suitable for people who want the hustle and bustle of the city Also a smell of drains in the area which is very common everywhere in Paris Not the Hotels fault obviously but a bit off putting   The location was fantastic Walking distance to the Eiffel Tower Louvre and Notre Dame Just off the Seine its in the street behind the Musee D Orsay EXCELLENT bus and train links just around the corner too The hotel staff were amazing and couldn t do enough for you The accommodation was classic and immaculate and we were driven a free upgrade to a triple room which gave us even more space The photos online are very accurate Breakfast was served from 7 11 and the choice available was outstanding We have never been to Paris before and we re so glad to have chosen this hotel over all the others due to its location and class

Hotel_Name: Hotel d Orsay Esprit de France
Full_Review: Having to leave   Comfortable and spacious room nice bed linens and luxurious towels Helpful and attentive staff super location Lacked nothing for comfort

Hotel_Name: Hotel d Orsay Esprit de France
Full_Review: Size of the room but this is Paris so it was as expected   The location is outstanding staff is truly helpful Room is well equipped and very quiet Breakfast was nice good selection and price in terms of Paris is good Overal a great choice

Hotel_Name: Hotel d Orsay Esprit de France
Full_Review: The staff were sensational they went out of their way to accomodate all of our needs The hotel is situated near main attractions and great restaurants

Hotel_Name: Hotel d Orsay Esprit de France
Full_Review: There is plenty of storage soace for folded clothes but not much for clothes on hangers Also it took until the second day to find the mini safe which is in the bathroom on the right side of the clothes closet I probably should have asked oh well   The staff at hotel D Orsay were very welcoming kind considerate and helpful I choose a hotel by the size cleanliness and quality of the bathrooms and in this hotel they were superb Large bathtub with a nice shower two sinks full length mirror clean white ties and marble floor If you re European and expect a bidet my room did not have one but I think most Americans do not expect a bidet The Windows opened put into a beautiful square solarium type garden which was quite beautiful The heating system worked perfectly so you could be warm all through the night when you sleep I especially liked all the antique furniture and real paintings on the wall Great USB chargers in the bedside night lamps so you only need to bring the cord without the plug I was near the elevator but never actually heard so the room was peaceful and quiet Although it was nice to hear the birds in the morning Breakfast had very healthy choices and I love the fact that they had s diner delivery service from I be uneven a nearby restaurant The neighborhood is safe and well lighted and 2 minutes from musee D Orsay and othe interesting sites I would definitely say there again I arrived to the hotel by public transportation which cost 10 plus the visit of a subway ticket and then it was a short 5 mi use walk to the hotel When I left I you d the airport shutle taxi for 60 to CDG just see above ground how far away the airport was With no traffic it s 30 minute With intense traffic it takes 1 hour 10 minutes

Hotel_Name: Hotel d Orsay Esprit de France
Full_Review: nothing  For Paris very large room well appointed Excellent location right behind Musee d Orsay close to Blvd St Germain 3 Minutes to Seine Lots of great restaurants bars in immediate neighbourhoud

Hotel_Name: Hotel d Orsay Esprit de France
Full_Review: I filter by parking but to my disappointment no parking is provided but a 40 day public parking 10 min away was offered instead   Staff excellent service

Hotel_Name: Hotel d Orsay Esprit de France
Full_Review: Very helpful staff superb location super comfortable bed even had evening turn down service with little chocolates placed in our pillows Very clean and we had a very roomy room by European standards

Hotel_Name: Hotel d Orsay Esprit de France
Full_Review: Our room was on the second floor and window was facing the street so there was some noise coming from the street in the mornings Though the street is quite quiet most of the time   Very friendly and helpful staff Delicious breakfast fresh bakery and very good coffee Comfortable bed

Hotel_Name: Hotel d Orsay Esprit de France
Full_Review: Could not fault Hotel d Orsay for anything Everything was excellent   Staff were amazing so genuinely helpful and well mannered could not do enough for you The excellent location was well worth the price Public transport an easy walk away We made it from the airport with ease apart from the steps we had to climb with baggage and traveled to Disneyland as well We had a family room for 2 adults and 1 8yr old child it was plenty spacious Small fridge and tea coffee setup and biscuits were welcome extras Highly recommended to all A

Hotel_Name: Hotel d Orsay Esprit de France
Full_Review: Room number 10 Location of television is very bad I hit my head many times It s location should be at the wall of the other side   Hospitality at the reception

Hotel_Name: Hotel d Orsay Esprit de France
Full_Review: No complaints here   This hotel was in the perfect location There was easy access to all the major sites via the underground which was a very short walk While being central to the major attractions the actual hotel was located in a more quiet and well maintained part of the city

Hotel_Name: Hotel d Orsay Esprit de France
Full_Review: The location is fantastic and the hotel well refurbished but the size of room is not comfortable for a long stay and two luggages The bathroom and shower was very good

Full_Review: I didn t like how the card is pre charged Card details should only be to reserve the room In this case I booked but my father in law wanted to pay This made it difficult

Full_Review: Club rooms on top of the hotel have some view on Eiffel tower but these rooms are rather small The night concierge is not friendly at all   Very good location for exploring the city especially Louvre and Orsay and nice clean modern rooms with very good toileteries Very convenient to get to the hotel from the airport with Uber only 36EUR takes approx an hour

Full_Review: The room was unbearably hot since the cool air was not turned on yet it s still winter and must be a European thing because we found this in all our hotels and we couldn t sleep with the window open due to street noise   The staff was the best part friendly and helpful with tips about the city The location was excellent and the room had almost everything we needed

Full_Review: Room is small so a bit hard to move around with 2 big luggages   The location is perfect just beside the Musee d Orsay There is small Carrefour shop around the corner 3 min walk to Metro subway I can see top of Eiffel tower and Notre Dame roof from my window Staff super friendly and free chocolate on the reception desk

Hotel_Name: Hotel d Orsay Esprit de France
Full_Review: The bed was very comfortable the room a little small but nicely decorated and top clean and excellent quality of the linen There is a honesty bar downstairs and the great coffee is free Great location Most of the Paris highlights are in walking distance

Hotel_Name: Hotel d Orsay Esprit de France
Full_Review: Breakfast buffet was a bit on the small side   The service was excellent and the staff couldn t do enough to help us The location of the hotel is perfect so close to the Champs lys es Louvre shopping tour Eiffel metro station etc The hotel itself was charming and it was lovely to stay in a more personalised and smaller place rather than a hotel chain

Hotel_Name: Hotel d Orsay Esprit de France
Full_Review: My wife and I had a standard room which was a little short on storage space while my children had a Superior Suite not sure how that happened which was excellent with everything needed Breakfast was a little expensive there is no restaurant at the hotel but this is no problem as we walked 200 yards down the road to one of the many excellent bakery cafes for breakfast   My family spent the week before Christmas 2016 at the hotel and it was one of the best we have had We got an excellent deal on the rooms making it very good value for money Location outstanding A 200 yards from Musee D Orsay and Metro A short walk from Louvre Notre Dame Hotel Des Invalides Eiffel Tower Latin Qaurter and Champs Elysees Hotel beds very comfortable rooms a little warm but even in mid winter we could open the window and the street is so quiet we could sleep well Staff excellent with in our case good English

Hotel_Name: Hotel d Orsay Esprit de France
Full_Review: Wifi was weak and intermittent We were staying on the first floor so there should not have been a problem   The staff was fantastic Super friendly and helpful

Hotel_Name: Hotel d Orsay Esprit de France
Full_Review: The Wi Fi was not working during our 4 day stay Internet connectivity was either not available or so slow as to be useless The cost of the breakfast 18 per person was ridiculous but at least there are several cafes within 2 or 3 minutes walk 14 90 for two breakfasts at the Caf de Mus e for example   The room was large and quiet and there was little noise from inside the hotel The bed was wide and very comfortable

Hotel_Name: Hotel d Orsay Esprit de France
Full_Review: Breakfast was good not spectacular for 18 so we ate out nearby bistros are not much cheaper but you get what you want   Staff were super helpful Room for three was large by Paris standards Location cetnral between Eiffel Notre Dame Quiet location relatively

Hotel_Name: Hotel d Orsay Esprit de France
Full_Review: We loved this hotel   We really enjoyed our stay a very clean spacious and nicely appointed room Appreciated the plentiful and good quality toiletries in room coffee tea water nice and reasonably priced minibar The staff were all very courteous pleasant and helpful We will choose this hotel for any further trips to Paris

Hotel_Name: Hotel d Orsay Esprit de France
Full_Review: Great location for what we wanted to do Bed not clean but they made up for it Nice and friendly staff and they arranged a shuttle to the airport for us too It was a white knuckle ride but not hotels fault Elevator Ice Fancy key ring Refrigerator Close to RER as well

Hotel_Name: Hotel d Orsay Esprit de France
Full_Review: Breakfast was 18 euros per person for a regular continental breakfast buffet  Hotel is perfectly located very clean and rooms are nice and cozy with an 18th century vibe We even got upgraded at check in to a superior room for free

Full_Review: Expensive but maybe that s Paris Wifi too slow for videos at times was the only other small issue   Lovely foyer and the whole hotel was beautiful The staff were very nice and accommodating Wonderful location and area

Hotel_Name: Hotel d Orsay Esprit de France
Full_Review: For the price we paid for the Junior Suite breakfast could have been included Better child friendly restaurant recommendations would have been appreciated The bistros we were recommended were lovely but not suitable for children The hotel recommended car transfer service would not have been needed if reception had been more encouraging about taking the metro it was very simple once we figured it out   Great location and friendly staff The Junior Suite Room 60 was lovely and a great size for our family of 4 2 adults and 2 seven year olds Musee D Orsay metro station and the museum itself are a couple of minutes walk away The metro line takes you to the Tower Eiffel and Notre Dame within a couple of stops or less It was easy taking a metro to Gare Du Nord one stop to Notre Dame change line and then about 4 stops to Gare du Nord We would have done this if the hotel had not advised us to order a more costly car transfer service instead of taking the metro There are some lovely bistros within walking distance It is also walking distance to central sites like the Louvre

Hotel_Name: Hotel d Orsay Esprit de France
Full_Review: I was in a club room It was a little small but that was ok as I was travelling solo For two people might be a bit of a squeeze so would recommend paying a little more for a bigger room   Lovely traditional Parisian hotel Staff were so friendly helpful and welcoming In walki g distance from the musuem d orsay and from the metro Lovely breakfast Would definitely stay here again

Hotel_Name: Hotel d Orsay Esprit de France
Full_Review: the room including the bathroom were spacious and comfortable The help yourself bar was relaxing and well stocked The recommendation for restaurants was wonderful

Hotel_Name: Hotel d Orsay Esprit de France
Full_Review: A great cozy hotel right next to the d Orsay Museum opposite the Tuileries Garden Yet the quartier is quite and authentic with almost no tourists at all The room was a little bit small but had great bathroom and all the facilities Even a book on a night table to read some pages before you fall asleep Fantastic staff and truly Parisian atmosphere I enjoyed my stay and would recommend this hotel Would love to stay again

Hotel_Name: Hotel d Orsay Esprit de France
Full_Review: Wifi signal in room was not very good Breakfast should be included in that price Everything else perfect i would go there again   Elegant hotel very polite and helpful staff excellent location very clean hotel

Hotel_Name: Hotel d Orsay Esprit de France
Full_Review: The room was typical Parisian compact but beautifully furnished and the bed was of high quality and very comfortable The Reception team could not be faulted and we re always on hand to assist with restaurant bookings and directions Check in and out was efficient and bag storage was provided to allow us to enjoy our final day in the city It s location is perfect for a short break within easy walking distance of museums bars restaurants and shops We highly recommend for a short leisure break

Hotel_Name: Hotel d Orsay Esprit de France
Full_Review: At check in without my permission making a colouted print copy of my Amex card including the ccv code He tried to do this after I had already paid for the stay with the credit card using the pin machine He did not know where I could park for a day When checking out no one asked how our stay was Paris or not hotels expecting guests from all over the world should have normal kungsize beds This bed was much too small for 2 people My petite daughter and I are far from large We pay to sleep for 2 Stayed in the 6th floor with an elevator to the 5th so you have to walk 2 flights of stairs   Wash gels

Hotel_Name: Hotel d Orsay Esprit de France
Full_Review: It just happened that the hotel airconditioning was broken the day I checked in I could not continue my stay in this hotel and swithed to another after staying all night awake It is a 4 star hotel rated 9 in the booking com whereas I found more comfort and bigger rooms bigger hotel excellent location same price in another 4 star hotel rated 8

Hotel_Name: Hotel d Orsay Esprit de France
Full_Review: Nothing  The staff were super friendly and helpful and they didn t mind listening to my poorly spoken French They were gracious There was a lift to our floor The location was perfect a stroll to the Place de Concorde and the Champs Elysee and almost next to the Musee D Orsay The mini bar was awesome for a catchup with other family also staying in the hotel They had a shuttle service from the airport Breakfast was absolutely delicious The room was modern and shower absolutely the best of our 5 week trip better than the Sofitel in London

Hotel_Name: Hotel d Orsay Esprit de France
Full_Review: Stayed August 2016 at the Penthouse Suite Just beautiful clean exactly as pictured King bed was amazing 2 twins bed in adjacent room 2 balconies Left Bank location perfect Staff amazing

Hotel_Name: Hotel d Orsay Esprit de France
Full_Review: Nothing  Everything The staff very friendly and helpful with suggestions for dining and points of interest very comfortable quiet clean and excellent facilities Lovely toiletries and bathrobes Great location and excellent staff

Hotel_Name: Hotel d Orsay Esprit de France
Full_Review: This hotel is located within reasonable walking distance of many attractions It is in a quiet neighborhood many excellent cafes within a few blocks The staff are fluent in English and very helpful Our stay there gave us an authentic Parisian experience since the rubbed elbows with so many locals in the cafes

Hotel_Name: Hotel d Orsay Esprit de France
Full_Review: It was absolutely outstanding Sebastian and the other staff were first rate and constantly went to any length to assist Location was perfect and as our honeymoon stay they even organised a bottle of champagne in our room upon arrival A across the board

Hotel_Name: Hotel d Orsay Esprit de France
Full_Review: We didn t have the breakfast as we were always happy to get on the move but the breakfast room did seem a little sad given the quality of the rooms and reception areas   This hotel is wonderfully positioned to explore Paris but feels secluded and tucked away The room and bathroom were well decorated with sumptuous curtains to aid a good night s sleep The towels bathrobes and toiletries were good quality Staff were very genuine and could not have been more friendly or helpful I will definitely be returning

Hotel_Name: Hotel d Orsay Esprit de France
Full_Review: Absolutely nothing  This was undeniably one of the best places we have ever stayed at Charming hotel great decor big rooms with great amenities and toiletries Staff were all fantastic incredibly helpful and welcoming Also at a fantastic location within walking distance to most attractions Definitely recommend

Hotel_Name: Hotel d Orsay Esprit de France
Full_Review: Nothing   I loved the location as it was in walking distance to all main attractions especially the louvre and musee D Orsay The staff were all amazing friendly and attentive The room had exposed heritage beams and great views ventilation Bed super comfy and bathroom the biggest we had in Paris The supplied toiletries were beautiful and generous Breakfast had a good range and really pleasant to kick off the day I ll certainly stay again

Hotel_Name: Hotel d Orsay Esprit de France
Full_Review: A wonderful hotel with a convenient location and very friendly staff Clean and spacious room for two people The staff are always ready to help resolve all the questions of the guests Special thanks and greetings to Molkeire I am pleased to visit this hotel again and will recommend it to our friends
